   241	
   242	def _infer_final_prediction(rollout_trace: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   243	    state = rollout_trace.get("state") or {}
   244	    for payload in (rollout_trace.get("final_answer"), state.get("finalized_case")):
   245	        if isinstance(payload, dict) and payload:
   246	            return _normalize_decision_payload(payload)
   247	    semantic_payload = _infer_semantic_payload(rollout_trace)
   248	    decision = dict((semantic_payload or {}).get("decision") or {})
   249	    if decision:
   250	        return _normalize_decision_payload(decision)
   251	    return {}
   252	
   253	
   254	def _decision_matches(prediction: Dict[str, Any], target: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
   255	    if not prediction or not target:
   256	        return False
   257	    if _normalize_existence(prediction.get("existence")) != _normalize_existence(target.get("existence")):
   258	        return False
   259	    target_existence = _normalize_existence(target.get("existence"))
   260	    if target_existence == "anomaly":
   261	        pred_category = canonicalize_saver_category(prediction.get("category"), existence="anomaly")
   262	        target_category = canonicalize_saver_category(target.get("category"), existence="anomaly")
   263	        if target_category and pred_category != target_category:
   264	            return False
   265	    target_counterfactual_type = _normalize_counterfactual_type(target.get("counterfactual_type"))
   266	    if target_counterfactual_type != "none":
   267	        if _normalize_counterfactual_type(prediction.get("counterfactual_type")) != target_counterfactual_type:
   268	            return False
   269	    if target.get("severity") is not None and prediction.get("severity") is not None:
   270	        if int(round(_safe_float(prediction.get("severity")))) != int(round(_safe_float(target.get("severity")))):
   271	            return False
   272	    return True
   273	
   274	
   275	def _latest_verifier_turn(rollout_trace: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
   276	    for turn in reversed(list(rollout_trace.get("turns") or [])):
   277	        if str(turn.get("tool_name") or "") == "verify_hypothesis":
   278	            copied = dict(turn)
   279	            copied["_verifier_source"] = "online_turn"
   280	            copied["_uses_reference_conditioned_verifier"] = False
   281	            return copied
   282	    offline_verifier = rollout_trace.get("offline_verifier")
   283	    if isinstance(offline_verifier, dict):
   284	        uses_reference_conditioned_verifier = bool(offline_verifier.get("reference_conditioned", True))
   285	        return {
   286	            "tool_name": "verify_hypothesis",
   287	            "verifier_primary_status": offline_verifier.get("primary_status"),
   288	            "verifier_recommended_action": offline_verifier.get("recommended_action"),
   289	            "verifier_derived_scores": offline_verifier.get("derived_scores") or {},
   290	            "covered_stages": offline_verifier.get("covered_stages") or [],
   291	            "missing_required_stages": offline_verifier.get("missing_required_stages") or [],
   292	            "stage_selected_moment_ids": offline_verifier.get("stage_selected_moment_ids") or {},
   293	            "_verifier_source": (
   294	                "offline_reference_conditioned" if uses_reference_conditioned_verifier else "offline_unconditioned"
   295	            ),
   296	            "_uses_reference_conditioned_verifier": uses_reference_conditioned_verifier,
   297	        }
   298	    return None
   299	
   300	
   301	def _normal_evidence_tool_turn_count(rollout_trace: Dict[str, Any]) -> int:
   302	    turns = list(rollout_trace.get("turns") or [])
   303	    return sum(
   304	        1
   305	        for turn in turns
   306	        if str(turn.get("tool_name") or "").strip() in NORMAL_EVIDENCE_TOOL_NAMES
   307	    )
   308	
   309	
   310	def _normal_search_tool_counts(rollout_trace: Dict[str, Any]) -> Tuple[int, int, int]:
   311	    turns = list(rollout_trace.get("turns") or [])
   312	    num_scan = sum(1 for turn in turns if str(turn.get("tool_name") or "").strip() == "scan_timeline")
   313	    num_seek = sum(1 for turn in turns if str(turn.get("tool_name") or "").strip() == "seek_evidence")
   314	    num_verify = sum(1 for turn in turns if str(turn.get("tool_name") or "").strip() == "verify_hypothesis")
   315	    return int(num_scan), int(num_seek), int(num_verify)
   316	
   317	
   318	def _normal_search_restraint_score(rollout_trace: Dict[str, Any]) -> float:
   319	    num_scan, num_seek, num_verify = _normal_search_tool_counts(rollout_trace)
   320	    score = 1.0
   321	    score -= 0.05 * max(0, int(num_scan) - 1)
   322	    score -= 0.10 * int(num_seek)
   323	    score -= 0.10 * max(0, int(num_verify) - 1)
   324	    return round(_clamp(score), 6)
   325	
   326	
   327	def _normal_window_restraint_score(
   328	    *,
   329	    selected_window_count: int,
   330	    selected_by_stage: Dict[str, Any],
   331	) -> float:
   332	    normalized_selected_by_stage = dict(selected_by_stage or {})
   333	    score = 1.0
   334	    score -= 0.15 * max(0, int(selected_window_count))
   335	    if list(normalized_selected_by_stage.get("trigger") or []):
   336	        score -= 0.25
   337	    if list(normalized_selected_by_stage.get("precursor") or []):
   338	        score -= 0.10
   339	    if list(normalized_selected_by_stage.get("confirmation") or []):
   340	        score -= 0.10
   341	    return round(_clamp(score), 6)
   342	
   343	
   344	def _normal_verification_consistency_score(rollout_trace: Dict[str, Any]) -> float:
   345	    verifier_turn = _latest_verifier_turn(rollout_trace)
   346	    if verifier_turn is None:
   347	        return 1.0
   348	    failure_reasons = list(verifier_turn.get("verifier_failure_reasons") or verifier_turn.get("failure_reasons") or [])
   349	    invalid_selected_ids = list(verifier_turn.get("invalid_selected_window_ids") or [])
   350	    recommended_action = str(
   351	        verifier_turn.get("verifier_recommended_action")
   352	        or verifier_turn.get("recommended_action")
   353	        or ""
   354	    ).strip().lower()
   355	    if not failure_reasons and not invalid_selected_ids:
   356	        if recommended_action == "finalize":
   357	            return 1.0
   358	        if recommended_action not in {"continue_search", "revise_claim", "refine_evidence"}:
   359	            return 0.6
   360	    return 0.2
   361	
   362	
   363	def _normal_continuous_verifier_score(rollout_trace: Dict[str, Any]) -> float:
   364	    details = _normal_continuous_verifier_score_details(rollout_trace)
   365	    return round(float(details.get("score_after_action") or 0.0), 6)
   366	
   367	
   368	def _normal_continuous_verifier_score_details(rollout_trace: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   369	    verifier_turn = _latest_verifier_turn(rollout_trace)
   370	    if verifier_turn is None:
   371	        return {
   372	            "primary_status": "unknown",
   373	            "recommended_action": "unknown",
   374	            "base_status_score": 0.5,
   375	            "action_offset": 0.0,
   376	            "score_before_action": 0.5,
   377	            "score_after_action": 0.5,
   378	        }
   379	    primary_status = str(
   380	        verifier_turn.get("verifier_primary_status")

    42	def _coerce_float(value: Any, default: float) -> float:
    43	    try:
    44	        return float(value)
    45	    except Exception:
    46	        return float(default)
    47	
    48	
    49	def _coerce_int(value: Any, default: int) -> int:
    50	    try:
    51	        return int(value)
    52	    except Exception:
    53	        return int(default)

    55	
    56	def _frame_bounds(multimodal_cache: Dict) -> Tuple[int, float, int]:
    57	    frames = multimodal_cache.get("video")
    58	    fps = float(multimodal_cache.get("fps") or 1.0)
    59	    if frames is not None:
    60	        total_frames = int(frames.shape[0])
    61	    else:
    62	        duration = float(multimodal_cache.get("duration") or 0.0)
    63	        total_frames = max(int(math.ceil(duration * fps)), 1)
    64	    return total_frames, fps, max(total_frames - 1, 0)
    65	
    66	
    67	def _select_uniform_indices(start_idx: int, end_idx: int, num_frames: int) -> List[int]:
    68	    if end_idx < start_idx:
    69	        return []
    70	    total = end_idx - start_idx + 1
    71	    num_frames = max(1, min(int(num_frames), total, MAX_NUM_KEY_FRAMES))
    72	    if total <= num_frames:
    73	        return list(range(start_idx, end_idx + 1))
    74	    return np.round(np.linspace(start_idx, end_idx, num_frames)).astype(int).tolist()
    75	
    76	
    77	def _select_stride_indices(start_idx: int, end_idx: int, stride_frames: int) -> List[int]:
    78	    if end_idx < start_idx:
    79	        return []
    80	    stride_frames = max(1, int(stride_frames))
    81	    indices = list(range(start_idx, end_idx + 1, stride_frames))
    82	    if not indices or indices[-1] != end_idx:
    83	        indices.append(end_idx)
    84	    indices = list(dict.fromkeys(int(index) for index in indices))
    85	    if len(indices) > MAX_NUM_KEY_FRAMES:
    86	        return _select_uniform_indices(indices[0], indices[-1], MAX_NUM_KEY_FRAMES)
    87	    return indices
    88	
    89	
    90	def _resolve_window(args: Dict[str, Any], multimodal_cache: Dict) -> Tuple[float, float, List[int], float]:
    91	    total_frames, fps, last_frame_idx = _frame_bounds(multimodal_cache)
    92	    duration = float(multimodal_cache.get("duration") or (total_frames / fps))
    93	    start_sec = max(0.0, _coerce_float(args.get("start_sec", args.get("start_time", 0.0)), 0.0))
    94	    end_sec = _coerce_float(args.get("end_sec", args.get("end_time", duration)), duration)
    95	    end_sec = min(max(start_sec, end_sec), duration)
    96	    start_idx = max(0, min(int(math.floor(start_sec * fps)), last_frame_idx))
    97	    end_idx = max(start_idx, min(int(math.floor(end_sec * fps)), last_frame_idx))
    98	    if args.get("stride_sec") is not None:
    99	        stride_sec = _coerce_float(args.get("stride_sec"), 0.0)
   100	        stride_frames = max(1, int(round(stride_sec * fps))) if stride_sec > 0 else 1
   101	        selected_indices = _select_stride_indices(start_idx, end_idx, stride_frames)
   102	    else:
   103	        num_frames = _coerce_int(args.get("num_frames", MAX_NUM_KEY_FRAMES), MAX_NUM_KEY_FRAMES)
   104	        selected_indices = _select_uniform_indices(start_idx, end_idx, num_frames)
   105	    return start_sec, end_sec, selected_indices, fps
   106	
   107	
   108	def _indices_to_timestamps(indices: List[int], fps: float) -> List[float]:
   109	    return [round(float(idx) / fps, 6) for idx in indices]

   112	def _build_visual_content(indices: List[int], multimodal_cache: Dict, footer: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
   113	    fps = float(multimodal_cache.get("fps") or 1.0)
   114	    frames = multimodal_cache.get("video")
   115	    frame_indices = multimodal_cache.get("frame_indices") or []
   116	    video_path = str(multimodal_cache.get("video_path") or "").strip()
   117	    timestamps = _indices_to_timestamps(indices, fps)
   118	    content: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
   119	    for i, timestamp in zip(indices, timestamps):
   120	        content.append({"type": "text", "text": f"{timestamp:.3f}s"})
   121	        if frames is not None and 0 <= i < len(frames):
   122	            image_item = {
   123	                "type": "image",
   124	                "image": frames[i],
   125	                "sampled_frame_index": int(i),
   126	                "timestamp_sec": float(timestamp),
   127	            }
   128	            if 0 <= int(i) < len(frame_indices):
   129	                image_item["raw_frame_index"] = int(frame_indices[int(i)])
   130	            content.append(image_item)
   131	        elif video_path:
   132	            raw_frame_index = int(frame_indices[int(i)]) if 0 <= int(i) < len(frame_indices) else int(i)
   133	            image_ref = {
   134	                "video_path": str(video_path),
   135	                "raw_frame_index": int(raw_frame_index),
   136	                "timestamp_sec": float(timestamp),
   137	            }
   138	            if 0 <= int(i) < len(frame_indices):
   139	                image_ref["sampled_frame_index"] = int(i)
   140	            content.append(
   141	                {
   142	                    "type": "image",
   143	                    "image_ref": image_ref,
   144	                    "timestamp_sec": float(timestamp),
   145	                }
   146	            )
   147	    content.append({"type": "text", "text": footer})
   148	    return content

   150	
   151	def _dedupe_string_list(values: List[Any] | Tuple[Any, ...] | None) -> List[str]:
   152	    deduped: List[str] = []
   153	    seen = set()
   154	    for value in values or []:
   155	        text = str(value).strip()
   156	        if not text or text in seen:
   157	            continue
   158	        deduped.append(text)
   159	        seen.add(text)
   160	    return deduped
   161	
   162	
   163	def _normalize_interval_tuple(value: Any) -> Tuple[float, float] | None:
   164	    if not isinstance(value, (list, tuple)) or len(value) != 2:
   165	        return None
   166	    try:
   167	        start_sec = float(value[0])
   168	        end_sec = float(value[1])
   169	    except Exception:
   170	        return None
   171	    if end_sec < start_sec:
   172	        start_sec, end_sec = end_sec, start_sec
   173	    return start_sec, end_sec
   174	
   175	
   176	def _interval_iou(interval_a: Any, interval_b: Any) -> float:
   177	    a = _normalize_interval_tuple(interval_a)
   178	    b = _normalize_interval_tuple(interval_b)
   179	    if a is None or b is None:
   180	        return 0.0
   181	    overlap = max(0.0, min(a[1], b[1]) - max(a[0], b[0]))
   182	    if overlap <= 0.0:
   183	        return 0.0
   184	    union = max(a[1] - a[0], 0.0) + max(b[1] - b[0], 0.0) - overlap
   185	    if union <= 0.0:
   186	        return 0.0
   187	    return max(0.0, min(1.0, overlap / union))
   188	
   189	
   190	def _oracle_moment_stage_lookup(multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, str]:
   191	    stage_by_moment_id: Dict[str, str] = {}
   192	    structured_target = dict(multimodal_cache.get("structured_target") or {})
   193	    chain_target = dict(structured_target.get("event_chain_target") or {})
   194	    for stage, moment_ids in dict(chain_target.get("stage_to_moment_ids") or {}).items():
   195	        normalized_stage = event_chain_stage_for_role(stage) or str(stage or "").strip().lower()
   196	        if normalized_stage not in {"precursor", "trigger", "confirmation"}:
   197	            continue
   198	        for moment_id in list(moment_ids or []):
   199	            moment_id_text = str(moment_id or "").strip()
   200	            if moment_id_text:
   201	                stage_by_moment_id[moment_id_text] = normalized_stage
   202	    for entry in list(((multimodal_cache.get("tool_io") or {}).get("oracle_windows_sec")) or []):
   203	        moment_id = str(entry.get("moment_id") or "").strip()
   204	        stage = event_chain_stage_for_role(entry.get("role"))
   205	        if moment_id and stage:
   206	            stage_by_moment_id[moment_id] = stage
   207	    return stage_by_moment_id
   208	
   209	
   210	def _oracle_window_entries(multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
   211	    windows: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
   212	    for entry in list(((multimodal_cache.get("tool_io") or {}).get("oracle_windows_sec")) or []):
   213	        moment_id = str(entry.get("moment_id") or "").strip()
   214	        interval = entry.get("window") or entry.get("window_sec")
   215	        normalized_interval = _normalize_interval_tuple(interval)
   216	        stage = event_chain_stage_for_role(entry.get("role"))
   217	        if not moment_id or normalized_interval is None:
   218	            continue
   219	        windows.append(
   220	            {
   221	                "moment_id": moment_id,
   222	                "stage": stage,
   223	                "interval": normalized_interval,
   224	            }
   225	        )
   226	    return windows
   227	
   228	
   229	def _runtime_entry_stage(entry: Dict[str, Any], *, stage_by_moment_id: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
   230	    stage = event_chain_stage_for_role(entry.get("role"))
   231	    if stage:
   232	        return stage
   233	    moment_id = str(entry.get("moment_id") or "").strip()
   234	    return stage_by_moment_id.get(moment_id, "")
   235	
   236	
   237	def _selected_evidence_entries_for_finalization(
   238	    state: SaverEnvironmentState,
   239	    decision_arguments: Dict[str, Any],
   240	) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
   241	    by_window_id = {
   242	        str(entry.get("window_id")): entry
   243	        for entry in state.evidence_ledger
   244	        if str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
   245	    }
   246	    by_evidence_id = {
   247	        str(entry.get("evidence_id")): entry
   248	        for entry in state.evidence_ledger
   249	        if str(entry.get("evidence_id") or "").strip()
   250	    }
   251	    selected_ids = _dedupe_string_list(
   252	        list(decision_arguments.get("selected_window_ids") or [])
   253	        + list(decision_arguments.get("verified_window_ids") or [])
   254	        + list(decision_arguments.get("best_effort_window_ids") or [])
   255	        + list(getattr(state, "active_evidence_window_ids", []) or [])
   256	    )
   257	    selected_evidence_ids = _dedupe_string_list(
   258	        list(decision_arguments.get("selected_evidence_ids") or [])
   259	        + [
   260	            value
   261	            for value in list(decision_arguments.get("evidence_moment_ids") or [])
   262	            if str(value or "").strip().startswith("e")
   263	        ]
   264	    )
   265	    selected: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
   266	    seen_window_ids = set()
   267	    for window_id in selected_ids:
   268	        entry = by_window_id.get(str(window_id))
   269	        if entry is None:
   270	            continue
   271	        resolved_window_id = str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
   272	        if not resolved_window_id or resolved_window_id in seen_window_ids:
   273	            continue
   274	        seen_window_ids.add(resolved_window_id)
   275	        selected.append(entry)
   276	    for evidence_id in selected_evidence_ids:
   277	        entry = by_evidence_id.get(str(evidence_id))
   278	        if entry is None:
   279	            continue
   280	        resolved_window_id = str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
   281	        if not resolved_window_id or resolved_window_id in seen_window_ids:
   282	            continue
   283	        seen_window_ids.add(resolved_window_id)
   284	        selected.append(entry)
   285	    if selected:
   286	        return selected
   287	    return list(state.evidence_ledger or [])
   288	
   289	
   290	def _resolve_finalized_moment_ids_from_state(
   291	    *,
   292	    decision_arguments: Dict[str, Any],
   293	    multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any],
   294	    state: SaverEnvironmentState,
   295	) -> Tuple[List[str], Dict[str, List[str]]]:
   296	    stage_by_moment_id = _oracle_moment_stage_lookup(multimodal_cache)
   297	    valid_moment_ids = set(stage_by_moment_id)
   298	    selected_entries = _selected_evidence_entries_for_finalization(state, decision_arguments)
   299	    selected_runtime_moment_ids = _dedupe_string_list([entry.get("moment_id") for entry in selected_entries])
   300	    requested_moment_ids = _dedupe_string_list(
   301	        [
   302	            value
   303	            for value in list(decision_arguments.get("evidence_moment_ids") or [])
   304	            if str(value or "").strip() in valid_moment_ids
   305	        ]
   306	    )
   307	    moment_ids = _dedupe_string_list(requested_moment_ids + [value for value in selected_runtime_moment_ids if value in valid_moment_ids])
   308	
   309	    if not moment_ids:
   310	        oracle_windows = _oracle_window_entries(multimodal_cache)
   311	        for entry in selected_entries:
   312	            entry_interval = _normalize_interval_tuple((entry.get("start_sec"), entry.get("end_sec")))
   313	            entry_stage = _runtime_entry_stage(entry, stage_by_moment_id=stage_by_moment_id)
   314	            best: Tuple[float, str] = (0.0, "")
   315	            for oracle in oracle_windows:
   316	                oracle_stage = str(oracle.get("stage") or "")
   317	                if entry_stage and oracle_stage and entry_stage != oracle_stage:
   318	                    continue
   319	                score = _interval_iou(entry_interval, oracle.get("interval"))
   320	                if score > best[0]:
   321	                    best = (score, str(oracle.get("moment_id") or ""))
   322	            if best[0] > 0.0 and best[1]:
   323	                moment_ids.append(best[1])
   324	        moment_ids = _dedupe_string_list(moment_ids)
   325	
   326	    if not moment_ids:
   327	        moment_ids = _dedupe_string_list(
   328	            [
   329	                value
   330	                for value in list(decision_arguments.get("evidence_moment_ids") or [])
   331	                if str(value or "").strip() in valid_moment_ids
   332	            ]
   333	        )
   334	
   335	    stage_selected: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}
   336	    for moment_id in moment_ids:
   337	        stage = stage_by_moment_id.get(moment_id)
   338	        if not stage:
   339	            continue
   340	        stage_selected.setdefault(stage, [])
   341	        if moment_id not in stage_selected[stage]:
   342	            stage_selected[stage].append(moment_id)
   343	    return moment_ids, stage_selected
   344

    31	def cleanup_llm_response(response_str: str) -> str:
    32	    tagged_blocks = list(re.finditer(r"<(tool_call|answer)>(.*?)</\1>", response_str, re.DOTALL))
    33	    if tagged_blocks:
    34	        return tagged_blocks[-1].group(0)
    35	    if "<think>" in response_str:
    36	        response_str = "<think>" + response_str.split("<think>")[-1]
    37	    return response_str

    40	def _finalize_retry_prompt(multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> str:
    41	    schema = ((multimodal_cache or {}).get("tool_io") or {}).get("finalize_case_schema") or {}
    42	    required = [str(field_name) for field_name in list(schema.get("required") or []) if str(field_name).strip()]
    43	    required_text = ", ".join(required) if required else "the required finalize_case fields"
    44	    return (
    45	        "The previous finalize_case call was invalid. Retry immediately with exactly one "
    46	        '<tool_call>{"name":"finalize_case","arguments":{...}}</tool_call>. '
    47	        f"finalize_case requires: {required_text}. "
    48	        "Prioritize a compact finalize_case that closes cleanly. "
    49	        "If optional summary, rationale, event_chain_summary, or qa_focus_answers would make the tool call too long, omit them. "
    50	        "Do not output <answer> yet. Do not describe the intended tool call in plain English."
    51	    )

    54	def _verify_retry_prompt(state: SaverEnvironmentState | None = None) -> str:
    55	    evidence_window_ids = [
    56	        str(entry.get("window_id")).strip()
    57	        for entry in (state.evidence_ledger if state is not None else [])
    58	        if str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
    59	    ]
    60	    selected_window_ids = evidence_window_ids[:1] or ["w0001"]
    61	    example_arguments = {
    62	        "verification_mode": "final_check",
    63	        "selected_window_ids": selected_window_ids,
    64	        "verification_decision": "insufficient",
    65	        "recommended_action": "continue_search",
    66	        "sufficiency_score": 0.3,
    67	        "necessity_score": 0.3,
    68	        "finalize_readiness_score": 0.2,
    69	        "counterfactual_faithfulness": 0.3,
    70	    }
    71	    return (
    72	        "The previous verify_hypothesis call was invalid. Retry immediately with exactly one "
    73	        f'<tool_call>{{"name":"verify_hypothesis","arguments":{json.dumps(example_arguments, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(",", ":"))}}}</tool_call>. '
    74	        "selected_window_ids must reference currently available evidence windows. "
    75	        "Do not output <answer> yet. Do not describe the intended tool call in plain English."
    76	    )
    77	
    78	
    79	def invalid_tool_call_message(
    80	    *,
    81	    tool_name: str | None = None,
    82	    multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    83	    state: SaverEnvironmentState | None = None,
    84	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    85	    if tool_name == "finalize_case":
    86	        prompt_text = _finalize_retry_prompt(multimodal_cache)
    87	    elif tool_name == "verify_hypothesis":
    88	        prompt_text = _verify_retry_prompt(state)
    89	    else:
    90	        prompt_text = INVALID_TOOL_CALL_PROMPT
    91	    return {
    92	        "role": "tool",
    93	        "name": "parse_error",
    94	        "content": [{"type": "text", "text": prompt_text}],
    95	    }
    96	
    97	
    98	def invalid_answer_message() -> Dict[str, Any]:
    99	    return {
   100	        "role": "tool",
   101	        "name": "parse_error",
   102	        "content": [{"type": "text", "text": INVALID_ANSWER_PROMPT}],
   103	    }
   104	
   105	
   106	def _parse_sec_value(value: Any) -> Any:
   107	    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   108	        return float(value)
   109	    if not isinstance(value, str):
   110	        return value
   111	    text = value.strip()
   112	    if not text:
   113	        return value
   114	    if text.endswith("s"):
   115	        text = text[:-1].strip()
   116	    if ":" in text:
   117	        parts = text.split(":")
   118	        try:
   119	            total = 0.0
   120	            for part in parts:
   121	                total = total * 60.0 + float(part)
   122	            return total
   123	        except Exception:
   124	            return value
   125	    try:
   126	        return float(text)
   127	    except Exception:
   128	        return value
   129	
   130	
   131	def _normalize_tool_arguments(name: str, arguments: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   132	    normalized = dict(arguments)
   133	    if "start_time" in normalized and "start_sec" not in normalized:
   134	        normalized["start_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized.pop("start_time"))
   135	    if "end_time" in normalized and "end_sec" not in normalized:
   136	        normalized["end_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized.pop("end_time"))
   137	    if "start_sec" in normalized:
   138	        normalized["start_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized["start_sec"])
   139	    if "end_sec" in normalized:
   140	        normalized["end_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized["end_sec"])
   141	    if "earliest_actionable_sec" in normalized:
   142	        normalized["earliest_actionable_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized["earliest_actionable_sec"])
   143	    if "earliest_alert_sec" in normalized:
   144	        normalized["earliest_alert_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized["earliest_alert_sec"])
   145	    return normalized
   146	
   147	
   148	def _parse_tool_payload(content: str) -> Dict[str, Any] | None:
   149	    parsed: Dict[str, Any] | None = None
   150	    try:
   151	        candidate = json.loads(content)
   152	    except Exception:
   153	        candidate = None
   154	
   155	    if candidate is None:
   156	        repaired_content = _repair_json_object_text(content)
   157	        if repaired_content is not None and repaired_content != content:
   158	            try:
   159	                candidate = json.loads(repaired_content)
   160	            except Exception:
   161	                candidate = None
   162	
   163	    if isinstance(candidate, dict):
   164	        if "name" in candidate:
   165	            parsed = {"name": candidate.get("name"), "arguments": candidate.get("arguments") or {}}
   166	        elif len(candidate) == 1:
   167	            tool_name, arguments = next(iter(candidate.items()))
   168	            if isinstance(arguments, dict):
   169	                parsed = {"name": tool_name, "arguments": arguments}
   170	
   171	    if parsed is None:
   172	        match = re.fullmatch(r"\{\s*([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\s*:\s*(\{.*\})\s*\}", content, re.DOTALL)
   173	        if match:
   174	            tool_name = match.group(1)
   175	            try:
   176	                arguments = json.loads(match.group(2))
   177	            except Exception:
   178	                arguments = None
   179	            if isinstance(arguments, dict):
   180	                parsed = {"name": tool_name, "arguments": arguments}
   181	
   182	    if parsed is None:
   183	        return None
   184	
   185	    name = str(parsed.get("name") or "").strip()
   186	    arguments = parsed.get("arguments") or {}
   187	    if not name or not isinstance(arguments, dict):
   188	        return None
   189	    return {"name": name, "arguments": _normalize_tool_arguments(name, arguments)}
   190	
   191	
   192	def _json_brace_balance(text: str) -> int:
   193	    balance = 0
   194	    in_string = False
   195	    escaped = False
   196	    for char in text:
   197	        if in_string:
   198	            if escaped:
   199	                escaped = False
   200	            elif char == "\\":
   201	                escaped = True
   202	            elif char == '"':
   203	                in_string = False
   204	            continue
   205	        if char == '"':
   206	            in_string = True
   207	        elif char == "{":
   208	            balance += 1
   209	        elif char == "}":
   210	            balance -= 1
   211	    return balance
   212	
   213	
   214	def _repair_json_object_text(text: str) -> str | None:
   215	    candidate = str(text or "").strip()
   216	    if not candidate.startswith("{"):
   217	        return None
   218	
   219	    repaired = candidate
   220	    balance = _json_brace_balance(repaired)
   221	    while balance < 0 and repaired.endswith("}"):
   222	        repaired = repaired[:-1].rstrip()
   223	        balance += 1
   224	    if balance > 0:
   225	        repaired = repaired + ("}" * balance)
   226	    return repaired if repaired else None
   227	
   228	
   229	def _parse_answer_payload(content: str) -> Dict[str, Any] | None:
   230	    try:
   231	        payload = json.loads(content)
   232	    except Exception:
   233	        repaired_content = _repair_json_object_text(content)
   234	        if repaired_content is None or repaired_content == content:
   235	            return None
   236	        try:
   237	            payload = json.loads(repaired_content)
   238	        except Exception:
   239	            return None
   240	    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
   241	        return None
   242	    return payload
   243	
   244	
   245	def _repair_truncated_finalize_tool_payload(content: str) -> Dict[str, Any] | None:
   246	    candidate = str(content or "").strip()
   247	    if not candidate.startswith("{") or "finalize_case" not in candidate or '"arguments"' not in candidate:
   248	        return None
   249	    cut_positions: List[int] = []
   250	    for field_name in OPTIONAL_FINALIZE_SEMANTIC_FIELDS:
   251	        for marker in (f',"{field_name}":', f', "{field_name}":'):
   252	            index = candidate.find(marker)
   253	            if index >= 0:
   254	                cut_positions.append(index)
   255	    for cut_index in sorted(set(cut_positions)):
   256	        truncated = candidate[:cut_index].rstrip()
   257	        repaired_candidate = _repair_json_object_text(truncated + "}}")
   258	        if not repaired_candidate:
   259	            continue
   260	        try:
   261	            parsed = json.loads(repaired_candidate)
   262	        except Exception:
   263	            continue
   264	        if isinstance(parsed, dict):
   265	            return parsed
   266	    return None
   267	
   268	
   269	def _extract_open_structured_fragment(prediction: str) -> Tuple[str | None, str]:
   270	    latest_tag = None
   271	    latest_index = -1
   272	    for tag_name in ("tool_call", "answer"):
   273	        open_tag = f"<{tag_name}>"
   274	        index = prediction.rfind(open_tag)
   275	        if index > latest_index:
   276	            latest_index = index
   277	            latest_tag = tag_name
   278	    if latest_tag is None or latest_index < 0:
   279	        return None, ""
   280	    content_start = latest_index + len(f"<{latest_tag}>")
   281	    return latest_tag, prediction[content_start:].strip()
   282	
   283	
   284	def parse_actions_and_contents(predictions: List[Any]) -> Tuple[List[str | None], List[Any]]:
   285	    actions: List[str | None] = []
   286	    contents: List[Any] = []
   287	    for prediction in predictions:
   288	        stripped_prediction = re.sub(r"<think>.*?</think>", "", prediction, flags=re.DOTALL)
   289	        matches = re.findall(r"<(tool_call|answer)>(.*?)</\1>", stripped_prediction, re.DOTALL)
   290	        if not matches:
   291	            matches = re.findall(r"<(tool_call|answer)>(.*?)</\1>", prediction, re.DOTALL)
   292	        match = matches[-1] if matches else None
   293	        if not match:
   294	            fallback_action, fallback_content = _extract_open_structured_fragment(prediction)
   295	            if fallback_action is None:
   296	                actions.append(None)
   297	                contents.append("")
   298	                continue
   299	            match = (fallback_action, fallback_content)
   300	        action = match[0]
   301	        content = match[1].strip()
   302	        if action == "tool_call":
   303	            func = _parse_tool_payload(content)
   304	            if func is None:
   305	                repaired_payload = _repair_truncated_finalize_tool_payload(content)
   306	                if isinstance(repaired_payload, dict):
   307	                    repaired_name = str(repaired_payload.get("name") or "").strip()
   308	                    repaired_arguments = repaired_payload.get("arguments") or {}
   309	                    if repaired_name and isinstance(repaired_arguments, dict):
   310	                        func = {
   311	                            "name": repaired_name,
   312	                            "arguments": _normalize_tool_arguments(repaired_name, repaired_arguments),
   313	                        }
   314	            if func is None:
   315	                actions.append(None)
   316	                contents.append("")
   317	            else:
   318	                actions.append("tool_call")
   319	                contents.append({"type": "function", "function": func})
   320	        else:
   321	            payload = _parse_answer_payload(content)
   322	            if payload is None:
   323	                actions.append("invalid_answer")
   324	                contents.append(content)
   325	            else:
   326	                actions.append("answer")
   327	                contents.append(content)
   328	    return actions, contents
   329	
   330	
   331	class SaverVideoInteraction:
   332	    """Step-level environment wrapper for SAVER-style tool use."""
   333	
   334	    def execute_predictions(
   335	        self,
   336	        predictions: List[str],
   337	        multimodal_cache_batch: List[Dict[str, Any]],
   338	        states: List[SaverEnvironmentState],
   339	        active_mask: List[bool],
   340	    ) -> Tuple[List[Any], List[int], List[int], List[int], List[SaverEnvironmentState]]:
   341	        cleaned = [cleanup_llm_response(prediction) for prediction in predictions]
   342	        actions, contents = parse_actions_and_contents(cleaned)
   343	
   344	        next_obs: List[Any] = []
   345	        dones: List[int] = []
   346	        valid_actions: List[int] = []
   347	        is_search: List[int] = []
   348	        next_states: List[SaverEnvironmentState] = []
   349	
   350	        for action, content, multimodal_cache, state, active in zip(
   351	            actions, contents, multimodal_cache_batch, states, active_mask
   352	        ):
   353	            if not active:
   354	                next_obs.append(None)
   355	                dones.append(1)
   356	                valid_actions.append(0)
   357	                is_search.append(0)
   358	                next_states.append(state)
   359	                continue
   360

     1	from __future__ import annotations

     7	    EVENT_CHAIN_STAGES,
     8	    build_stage_selected_moment_ids_schema,
     9	    normalize_event_chain_stages,
    10	    normalize_stage_selected_moment_ids,

    13	SELF_VERIFICATION_DECISIONS = {"insufficient", "sufficient", "misaligned", "redundant"}
    14	SELF_VERIFICATION_ACTIONS = {"continue_search", "revise_claim", "refine_evidence", "finalize"}
    15	SELF_VERIFICATION_MODES = {
    16	    "final_check",
    17	    "full_keep_drop",
    18	    "reward_only",
    19	    "search_step_check",
    20	}
    21	PUBLIC_SELF_VERIFICATION_MODES = SELF_VERIFICATION_MODES - {"search_step_check"}
    22	LEGACY_VERIFICATION_MODE_ALIASES = {
    23	    "normal_check": "final_check",
    24	    "declare_normal": "final_check",
    25	}
    26	PRIMARY_STATUS_TO_DECISION = {
    27	    "complete": "sufficient",
    28	    "incomplete": "insufficient",
    29	    "misaligned": "misaligned",
    30	    "redundant": "redundant",
    31	}
    32	DECISION_TO_PRIMARY_STATUS = {
    33	    "sufficient": "complete",
    34	    "insufficient": "incomplete",
    35	    "misaligned": "misaligned",
    36	    "redundant": "redundant",
    37	}
    38	POLICY_SELF_VERIFICATION_CLAIM_KEYS = ("existence", "category", "earliest_actionable_sec")
    39	POLICY_SELF_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
    40	    "verification_mode",
    41	    "selected_window_ids",
    42	    "verification_decision",
    43	    "recommended_action",
    44	    "sufficiency_score",
    45	    "necessity_score",
    46	    "finalize_readiness_score",
    47	    "counterfactual_faithfulness",
    48	)

    50	
    51	def _compact_payload_object(payload: Dict[str, Any], *, keys: tuple[str, ...]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    52	    compact: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    53	    for key in keys:
    54	        if key not in payload:
    55	            continue
    56	        value = payload.get(key)
    57	        if value is None:
    58	            continue
    59	        if isinstance(value, str) and not value.strip():
    60	            continue
    61	        compact[key] = value
    62	    return compact
    63	
    64	
    65	def _coerce_string_list(value: Any) -> List[str]:
    66	    if value is None:
    67	        return []
    68	    if isinstance(value, (list, tuple, set)):
    69	        result: List[str] = []
    70	        for item in value:
    71	            text = str(item).strip()
    72	            if text:
    73	                result.append(text)
    74	        return result
    75	    text = str(value).strip()
    76	    return [text] if text else []
    77	
    78	
    79	def _coerce_score(value: Any, default: float = 0.0) -> float:
    80	    try:
    81	        return max(0.0, min(1.0, float(value)))
    82	    except Exception:
    83	        return float(default)
    84	
    85	
    86	def _normalize_decision(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
    87	    decision = str(payload.get("verification_decision") or "").strip().lower()
    88	    if decision in SELF_VERIFICATION_DECISIONS:
    89	        return decision
    90	    primary_status = str(payload.get("primary_status") or "").strip().lower()
    91	    return PRIMARY_STATUS_TO_DECISION.get(primary_status, "insufficient")
    92	
    93	
    94	def _normalize_action(payload: Dict[str, Any], decision: str) -> str:
    95	    action = str(payload.get("recommended_action") or "").strip().lower()
    96	    if action in SELF_VERIFICATION_ACTIONS:
    97	        return action
    98	    if decision == "sufficient":
    99	        return "finalize"
   100	    if decision == "misaligned":
   101	        return "revise_claim"
   102	    if decision == "redundant":
   103	        return "refine_evidence"
   104	    return "continue_search"
   105	
   106	
   107	def normalize_self_verification_mode(
   108	    value: Any,
   109	    *,
   110	    default: str = "reward_only",
   111	    public_only: bool = False,
   112	) -> str:
   113	    text = str(value or "").strip().lower()
   114	    if text in LEGACY_VERIFICATION_MODE_ALIASES:
   115	        return LEGACY_VERIFICATION_MODE_ALIASES[text]
   116	    if public_only and text == "search_step_check":
   117	        text = "full_keep_drop"
   118	    if text in SELF_VERIFICATION_MODES:
   119	        return text
   120	    fallback = str(default or "reward_only").strip().lower() or "reward_only"
   121	    if fallback in LEGACY_VERIFICATION_MODE_ALIASES:
   122	        fallback = LEGACY_VERIFICATION_MODE_ALIASES[fallback]
   123	    if public_only and fallback == "search_step_check":
   124	        fallback = "full_keep_drop"
   125	    return fallback
   126	
   127	
   128	def _derive_failure_reasons(primary_status: str) -> List[str]:
   129	    reasons: List[str] = []
   130	    if primary_status == "incomplete":
   131	        reasons.append("selected_evidence_not_sufficient")
   132	    elif primary_status == "misaligned":
   133	        reasons.append("selected_evidence_not_aligned_with_claim")
   134	    elif primary_status == "redundant":
   135	        reasons.append("selected_evidence_not_necessary_enough")
   136	    return reasons
   137	
   138	
   139	def parse_self_verification_payload(
   140	    payload: Dict[str, Any],
   141	    *,
   142	    fallback_claim: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
   143	    verification_mode: str = "reward_only",
   144	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   145	    payload = dict(payload or {})
   146	    claim = validate_canonical_category_payload(
   147	        dict(payload.get("claim") or fallback_claim or {}),
   148	        payload_name="claim",
   149	        require_category_for_anomaly=True,
   150	    )
   151	    verification_mode_normalized = normalize_self_verification_mode(
   152	        payload.get("verification_mode") or verification_mode,
   153	        default=verification_mode,
   154	        public_only=True,
   155	    )
   156	
   157	    decision = _normalize_decision(payload)
   158	    primary_status = DECISION_TO_PRIMARY_STATUS.get(decision, "incomplete")
   159	    recommended_action = _normalize_action(payload, decision)
   160	
   161	    derived_scores_in = dict(payload.get("derived_scores") or {})
   162	    sufficiency = _coerce_score(payload.get("sufficiency_score", derived_scores_in.get("sufficiency", 0.0)))
   163	    necessity = _coerce_score(payload.get("necessity_score", derived_scores_in.get("necessity", 0.0)))
   164	    finalize_readiness = _coerce_score(
   165	        payload.get("finalize_readiness_score", derived_scores_in.get("finalize_readiness", 0.0))
   166	    )
   167	    counterfactual_faithfulness = _coerce_score(
   168	        payload.get(
   169	            "counterfactual_faithfulness",
   170	            derived_scores_in.get("counterfactual_faithfulness", 0.0),
   171	        )
   172	    )
   173	    consistency = _coerce_score(
   174	        derived_scores_in.get("consistency", 1.0 - abs(sufficiency - necessity) if (sufficiency or necessity) else 0.0)
   175	    )
   176	    derived_scores = {
   177	        "sufficiency": round(sufficiency, 6),
   178	        "necessity": round(necessity, 6),
   179	        "consistency": round(consistency, 6),
   180	        "finalize_readiness": round(finalize_readiness, 6),
   181	        "counterfactual_faithfulness": round(counterfactual_faithfulness, 6),
   182	    }
   183	
   184	    selected_window_ids = _coerce_string_list(
   185	        payload.get("selected_window_ids")
   186	        or payload.get("verified_window_ids")
   187	        or payload.get("best_effort_window_ids")
   188	    )
   189	    candidate_window_ids = _coerce_string_list(payload.get("candidate_window_ids"))
   190	    selected_evidence_ids = _coerce_string_list(
   191	        payload.get("selected_evidence_ids")
   192	        or payload.get("candidate_evidence_ids")
   193	        or payload.get("evidence_ids")
   194	    )
   195	    selected_evidence_moment_ids = _coerce_string_list(
   196	        payload.get("selected_evidence_moment_ids")
   197	        or payload.get("candidate_evidence_moment_ids")
   198	        or payload.get("evidence_moment_ids")
   199	    )
   200	    best_effort_window_ids = list(selected_window_ids or candidate_window_ids)
   201	    failure_reasons = _coerce_string_list(payload.get("failure_reasons")) or _derive_failure_reasons(primary_status)
   202	    stage_selected_moment_ids = normalize_stage_selected_moment_ids(payload.get("stage_selected_moment_ids"))
   203	    covered_stages = normalize_event_chain_stages(
   204	        payload.get("covered_stages") or stage_selected_moment_ids.keys()
   205	    )
   206	    missing_required_stages = normalize_event_chain_stages(payload.get("missing_required_stages"))
   207	
   208	    parsed = {
   209	        "verification_mode": verification_mode_normalized,
   210	        "claim": claim,
   211	        "query": str(payload.get("query") or ""),
   212	        "candidate_window_ids": candidate_window_ids,
   213	        "candidate_evidence_ids": _coerce_string_list(payload.get("candidate_evidence_ids")),
   214	        "candidate_evidence_moment_ids": _coerce_string_list(
   215	            payload.get("candidate_evidence_moment_ids") or payload.get("evidence_moment_ids")
   216	        ),
   217	        "selected_window_ids": selected_window_ids,
   218	        "selected_evidence_ids": selected_evidence_ids,
   219	        "selected_evidence_moment_ids": selected_evidence_moment_ids,
   220	        "verification_decision": decision,
   221	        "recommended_action": recommended_action,
   222	        "rationale": str(payload.get("rationale") or payload.get("explanation") or ""),
   223	        "primary_status": primary_status,
   224	        "derived_scores": derived_scores,
   225	        "verified_window_ids": list(selected_window_ids),
   226	        "best_effort_window_ids": best_effort_window_ids,
   227	        "failure_reasons": failure_reasons,
   228	        "covered_stages": covered_stages,
   229	        "missing_required_stages": missing_required_stages,
   230	        "stage_selected_moment_ids": stage_selected_moment_ids,
   231	        "verifier_backend": "self_report",
   232	        "self_verification_scores": dict(derived_scores),
   233	        "self_verification_selected_window_ids": list(selected_window_ids),
   234	        "self_verification_confidence": round(max(sufficiency, necessity, finalize_readiness), 6),
   235	    }
   236	    return parsed
   237	
   238	
   239	def validate_policy_self_verification_payload(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   240	    normalized = dict(payload or {})
   241	    missing = [
   242	        field_name
   243	        for field_name in POLICY_SELF_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED_FIELDS
   244	        if field_name not in normalized
   245	    ]
   246	    if missing:
   247	        raise ValueError(
   248	            "verify_hypothesis self-verification payload is missing required field(s): "
   249	            + ", ".join(missing)
   250	            + "."
   251	        )
   252	    if not _coerce_string_list(normalized.get("selected_window_ids")):
   253	        raise ValueError(
   254	            "verify_hypothesis self-verification payload must include at least one selected_window_id."
   255	        )
   256	    return normalized
   257	
   258	
   259	def build_policy_self_verification_payload(
   260	    payload: Dict[str, Any],
   261	    *,
   262	    include_query: bool = True,
   263	    include_rationale: bool = True,
   264	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   265	    source = dict(payload or {})
   266	    decision = _normalize_decision(source)
   267	    recommended_action = _normalize_action(source, decision)
   268	    compact: Dict[str, Any] = {
   269	        "verification_mode": normalize_self_verification_mode(
   270	            source.get("verification_mode"),
   271	            default="reward_only",
   272	            public_only=True,
   273	        ),
   274	        "verification_decision": decision,
   275	        "recommended_action": recommended_action,
   276	        "sufficiency_score": round(_coerce_score(source.get("sufficiency_score")), 6),
   277	        "necessity_score": round(_coerce_score(source.get("necessity_score")), 6),
   278	        "finalize_readiness_score": round(
   279	            _coerce_score(source.get("finalize_readiness_score"))
   280	        ),
   281	        "counterfactual_faithfulness": round(_coerce_score(source.get("counterfactual_faithfulness")), 6),
   282	    }
   283	
   284	    claim = source.get("claim")
   285	    if isinstance(claim, dict) and claim:
   286	        normalized_claim = validate_canonical_category_payload(
   287	            dict(claim),
   288	            payload_name="claim",
   289	            require_category_for_anomaly=True,
   290	        )
   291	        compact_claim = _compact_payload_object(
   292	            normalized_claim,
   293	            keys=POLICY_SELF_VERIFICATION_CLAIM_KEYS,
   294	        )
   295	        if compact_claim:
   296	            compact["claim"] = compact_claim
   297	
   298	    query = str(source.get("query") or "").strip()
   299	    if include_query and query:
   300	        compact["query"] = query
   301	
   302	    selected_window_ids = _coerce_string_list(
   303	        source.get("selected_window_ids")
   304	        or source.get("verified_window_ids")
   305	        or source.get("best_effort_window_ids")
   306	    )
   307	    if selected_window_ids:
   308	        compact["selected_window_ids"] = selected_window_ids
   309	
   310	    selected_evidence_moment_ids = _coerce_string_list(
   311	        source.get("selected_evidence_moment_ids")
   312	        or source.get("evidence_moment_ids")
   313	        or source.get("candidate_evidence_moment_ids")
   314	    )
   315	    if selected_evidence_moment_ids:
   316	        compact["selected_evidence_moment_ids"] = selected_evidence_moment_ids
   317	
   318	    covered_stages = normalize_event_chain_stages(source.get("covered_stages"))
   319	    if covered_stages or "covered_stages" in source:
   320	        compact["covered_stages"] = covered_stages

hook: PostToolUse

   170	def build_user_prompt(
   171	    record: Dict,
   172	    *,
   173	    preview_available: bool = False,
   174	    prompt_config: PromptConfig | None = None,
   175	) -> str:
   176	    prompt_config = prompt_config or PromptConfig()
   177	    scene = record.get("scene", {}).get("scenario", "unknown")
   178	    duration = record.get("video_meta", {}).get("duration_sec", "unknown")
   179	    task_prompt = record.get("agent_task", {}).get("task_prompt", "")
   180	    criteria = record.get("agent_task", {}).get("success_criteria", [])
   181	    criteria_text = "\n".join(f"- {item}" for item in criteria) or "- none provided"
   182	    public_case_id = build_public_case_id(record)
   183	    prompt = prompt_config.initial_user_template.format(
   184	        video_id=public_case_id,
   185	        public_case_id=public_case_id,
   186	        raw_video_id=public_case_id,
   187	        scene=scene,
   188	        duration=duration,
   189	        task_prompt=task_prompt,
   190	        criteria_text=criteria_text,
   191	    )
   192	    if preview_available and prompt_config.preview_instruction:
   193	        prompt += f"\n{prompt_config.preview_instruction}"
   194	    return prompt
   195

    13	    '<tool_call>{"name":"scan_timeline","arguments":{"start_sec":0.0,"end_sec":4.0}}</tool_call> '
    14	    'or <tool_call>{"name":"verify_hypothesis","arguments":{"verification_mode":"final_check","claim":{"existence":"anomaly","category":"assault"},"selected_window_ids":["w0001"],"verification_decision":"insufficient","recommended_action":"continue_search","sufficiency_score":0.3,"necessity_score":0.3,"finalize_readiness_score":0.2,"counterfactual_faithfulness":0.3}}</tool_call> '

    31	def cleanup_llm_response(response_str: str) -> str:
    32	    tagged_blocks = list(re.finditer(r"<(tool_call|answer)>(.*?)</\1>", response_str, re.DOTALL))
    33	    if tagged_blocks:
    34	        return tagged_blocks[-1].group(0)
    35	    if "<think>" in response_str:
    36	        response_str = "<think>" + response_str.split("<think>")[-1]
    37	    return response_str

    40	def _finalize_retry_prompt(multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any] | None = None) -> str:
    41	    schema = ((multimodal_cache or {}).get("tool_io") or {}).get("finalize_case_schema") or {}
    42	    required = [str(field_name) for field_name in list(schema.get("required") or []) if str(field_name).strip()]
    43	    required_text = ", ".join(required) if required else "the required finalize_case fields"
    44	    return (
    45	        "The previous finalize_case call was invalid. Retry immediately with exactly one "
    46	        '<tool_call>{"name":"finalize_case","arguments":{...}}</tool_call>. '
    47	        f"finalize_case requires: {required_text}. "
    48	        "Prioritize a compact finalize_case that closes cleanly. "
    49	        "If optional summary, rationale, event_chain_summary, or qa_focus_answers would make the tool call too long, omit them. "
    50	        "Do not output <answer> yet. Do not describe the intended tool call in plain English."
    51	    )

    54	def _verify_retry_prompt(state: SaverEnvironmentState | None = None) -> str:
    55	    evidence_window_ids = [
    56	        str(entry.get("window_id")).strip()
    57	        for entry in (state.evidence_ledger if state is not None else [])
    58	        if str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
    59	    ]
    60	    selected_window_ids = evidence_window_ids[:1] or ["w0001"]
    61	    example_arguments = {
    62	        "verification_mode": "final_check",
    63	        "selected_window_ids": selected_window_ids,
    64	        "verification_decision": "insufficient",
    65	        "recommended_action": "continue_search",
    66	        "sufficiency_score": 0.3,
    67	        "necessity_score": 0.3,
    68	        "finalize_readiness_score": 0.2,
    69	        "counterfactual_faithfulness": 0.3,
    70	    }
    71	    return (
    72	        "The previous verify_hypothesis call was invalid. Retry immediately with exactly one "
    73	        f'<tool_call>{{"name":"verify_hypothesis","arguments":{json.dumps(example_arguments, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(",", ":"))}}}</tool_call>. '
    74	        "selected_window_ids must reference currently available evidence windows. "
    75	        "Do not output <answer> yet. Do not describe the intended tool call in plain English."
    76	    )

    79	def invalid_tool_call_message(
    80	    *,
    81	    tool_name: str | None = None,
    82	    multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    83	    state: SaverEnvironmentState | None = None,
    84	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    85	    if tool_name == "finalize_case":
    86	        prompt_text = _finalize_retry_prompt(multimodal_cache)
    87	    elif tool_name == "verify_hypothesis":
    88	        prompt_text = _verify_retry_prompt(state)
    89	    else:
    90	        prompt_text = INVALID_TOOL_CALL_PROMPT
    91	    return {
    92	        "role": "tool",
    93	        "name": "parse_error",
    94	        "content": [{"type": "text", "text": prompt_text}],
    95	    }

   100	        "role": "tool",
   101	        "name": "parse_error",

   105	
   106	def _parse_sec_value(value: Any) -> Any:
   107	    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   108	        return float(value)
   109	    if not isinstance(value, str):
   110	        return value
   111	    text = value.strip()
   112	    if not text:
   113	        return value
   114	    if text.endswith("s"):
   115	        text = text[:-1].strip()
   116	    if ":" in text:
   117	        parts = text.split(":")
   118	        try:
   119	            total = 0.0
   120	            for part in parts:
   121	                total = total * 60.0 + float(part)
   122	            return total
   123	        except Exception:
   124	            return value
   125	    try:
   126	        return float(text)
   127	    except Exception:
   128	        return value
   129	
   130	
   131	def _normalize_tool_arguments(name: str, arguments: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   132	    normalized = dict(arguments)
   133	    if "start_time" in normalized and "start_sec" not in normalized:
   134	        normalized["start_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized.pop("start_time"))
   135	    if "end_time" in normalized and "end_sec" not in normalized:
   136	        normalized["end_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized.pop("end_time"))
   137	    if "start_sec" in normalized:
   138	        normalized["start_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized["start_sec"])
   139	    if "end_sec" in normalized:
   140	        normalized["end_sec"] = _parse_sec_value(normalized["end_sec"])

   621	    return runtime
