   623	
   624	def _reduce_primary_status(
   625	    *,
   626	    view_scores: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]],
   627	    derived_scores: Dict[str, float],
   628	) -> str:
   629	    keep_scores = view_scores["keep"]
   630	    full_scores = view_scores["full"]
   631	    drop_scores = view_scores["drop"]
   632	
   633	    if keep_scores["exist_support"] < 0.2 and keep_scores["temporal_support"] < 0.2:
   634	        return "misaligned"
   635	    if keep_scores["category_support"] < 0.15 and keep_scores["overall_support"] < 0.35:
   636	        return "misaligned"
   637	    if keep_scores["overall_support"] < 0.55 and full_scores["overall_support"] >= 0.60:
   638	        return "incomplete"
   639	    if keep_scores["overall_support"] >= 0.60 and drop_scores["overall_support"] >= 0.65:
   640	        return "redundant"
   641	    if (
   642	        keep_scores["overall_support"] >= 0.60
   643	        and derived_scores["necessity"] >= 0.20
   644	        and derived_scores["consistency"] >= 0.75
   645	    ):
   646	        return "complete"
   647	    return "incomplete"
   648	
   649	
   650	def _recommended_action(primary_status: str, verification_mode: str) -> str:
   651	    if primary_status == "misaligned":
   652	        return "revise_claim"
   653	    if primary_status == "incomplete":
   654	        return "continue_search"
   655	    if primary_status == "redundant":
   656	        return "refine_evidence"
   657	    if primary_status == "complete":
   658	        if verification_mode in {"final_check", "full_keep_drop", "reward_only", "search_step_check"}:
   659	            return "finalize"
   660	        return "finalize"
   661	    return "continue_search"
   662	
   663	
   664	def _failure_reasons(primary_status: str) -> List[str]:
   665	    reasons: List[str] = []
   666	    if primary_status == "incomplete":
   667	        reasons.append("selected_evidence_not_sufficient")
   668	    elif primary_status == "redundant":
   669	        reasons.append("selected_evidence_not_necessary_enough")
   670	    elif primary_status == "misaligned":
   671	        reasons.append("selected_evidence_not_aligned_with_claim")
   672	    return reasons
   673	
   674	
   675	def run_counterfactual_verifier(
   676	    *,
   677	    state: SaverEnvironmentState,
   678	    multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any],
   679	    verification_mode: str,
   680	    claim: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
   681	    candidate_window_ids: Optional[Sequence[str]] = None,
   682	    candidate_evidence_ids: Optional[Sequence[str]] = None,
   683	    candidate_evidence_moment_ids: Optional[Sequence[str]] = None,
   684	    alert: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
   685	    query: str = "",
   686	    backend: str = "qwen_self_verifier",
   687	    use_reference_supervision: bool = True,
   688	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   689	    requested_backend = str(backend or "qwen_self_verifier")
   690	    if requested_backend != "qwen_self_verifier":
   691	        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported verifier backend: {requested_backend}")
   692	    claim = dict(claim or {})
   693	    target = _extract_target(
   694	        multimodal_cache,
   695	        use_reference_supervision=use_reference_supervision,
   696	    )
   697	    oracle_windows = _extract_oracle_windows(
   698	        multimodal_cache,
   699	        use_reference_supervision=use_reference_supervision,
   700	    )
   701	    merged_claim = {**target, **claim} if use_reference_supervision else dict(claim)
   702	    selected_windows = _resolve_windows(
   703	        state,
   704	        candidate_window_ids=candidate_window_ids,
   705	        candidate_evidence_ids=candidate_evidence_ids,
   706	        candidate_evidence_moment_ids=candidate_evidence_moment_ids,
   707	    )
   708	
   709	    selected_window_ids = set(_window_ids(selected_windows))
   710	    full_windows = list(state.evidence_ledger)
   711	    if not full_windows:
   712	        full_windows = [
   713	            entry for entry in state.visited_windows
   714	            if str(entry.get("kind") or "") != "scan"
   715	        ]
   716	    drop_windows = [entry for entry in full_windows if entry.get("window_id") not in selected_window_ids]
   717	
   718	    include_precursor = _precursor_is_applicable(claim=merged_claim, target=target)
   719	    runtime = _resolve_qwen_verifier_runtime(multimodal_cache)
   720	    view_payloads = {
   721	        "full": _view_payload(view_name="full", windows=full_windows, multimodal_cache=multimodal_cache),
   722	        "keep": _view_payload(view_name="keep", windows=selected_windows, multimodal_cache=multimodal_cache),
   723	        "drop": _view_payload(view_name="drop", windows=drop_windows, multimodal_cache=multimodal_cache),
   724	    }
   725	    view_scores = runtime.score_views(
   726	        views=view_payloads,
   727	        claim=merged_claim,
   728	        verification_mode=verification_mode,
   729	        question=str(multimodal_cache.get("question") or query),
   730	    )
   731	    view_scores = _renormalize_view_scores(
   732	        view_scores,
   733	        include_precursor=include_precursor,
   734	    )
   735	    derived_scores = _derive_scores(view_scores)
   736	    primary_status = _reduce_primary_status(view_scores=view_scores, derived_scores=derived_scores)
   737	    stage_selected_moment_ids, covered_stages = _selected_event_chain_state(
   738	        selected_windows=selected_windows,
   739	        claim=merged_claim,
   740	        target=target,
   741	        oracle_windows=oracle_windows,
   742	    )
   743	    required_stages = _required_event_chain_stages(
   744	        claim=merged_claim,
   745	        target=target,
   746	        oracle_windows=oracle_windows,
   747	    )
   748	    missing_required_stages = [stage for stage in required_stages if stage not in set(covered_stages)]
   749	    if missing_required_stages and primary_status != "misaligned":
   750	        primary_status = "incomplete"
   751	    recommended_action = _recommended_action(primary_status, verification_mode)
   752	
   753	    verified_window_ids = _window_ids(selected_windows)
   754	    selectors_provided = bool(candidate_window_ids) or bool(candidate_evidence_ids) or bool(candidate_evidence_moment_ids)
   755	    best_effort_window_ids = list(verified_window_ids)
   756	    if not best_effort_window_ids and full_windows and not selectors_provided:
   757	        best_effort_window_ids = _window_ids(full_windows[:1])
   758	
   759	    failure_reasons = _failure_reasons(primary_status)
   760	    if missing_required_stages:
   761	        failure_reasons.append("missing_required_event_chain_stages")
   762	    explanation = (
   763	        f"Verification mode {verification_mode}: selected evidence is {primary_status} "
   764	        f"for finalize readiness."
   765	    )
   766	    if covered_stages or missing_required_stages:
   767	        explanation += (
   768	            " Event-chain coverage: covered="
   769	            + ",".join(covered_stages or ["none"])
   770	            + " missing="
   771	            + ",".join(missing_required_stages or ["none"])
   772	            + "."
   773	        )
   774	
   775	    verdict = {
   776	        "verification_mode": verification_mode,
   777	        "primary_status": primary_status,
   778	        "recommended_action": recommended_action,
   779	        "covered_stages": covered_stages,
   780	        "missing_required_stages": missing_required_stages,
   781	        "stage_selected_moment_ids": stage_selected_moment_ids,
   782	        "view_scores": view_scores,
   783	        "derived_scores": derived_scores,
   784	        "verified_window_ids": verified_window_ids,
   785	        "best_effort_window_ids": best_effort_window_ids,
   786	        "failure_reasons": failure_reasons,
   787	        "explanation": explanation,
   788	        "requested_verifier_backend": requested_backend,
   789	        "verifier_backend": "qwen_self_verifier",
   790	        "candidate_window_ids": list(candidate_window_ids or []),
   791	        "candidate_evidence_ids": list(candidate_evidence_ids or []),
   792	        "candidate_evidence_moment_ids": list(candidate_evidence_moment_ids or []),
   793	        "query": query,
   794	        "claim": merged_claim,
   795	        "use_reference_supervision": bool(use_reference_supervision),
   796	    }
   797	    if primary_status not in PRIMARY_STATUS_VALUES:
   798	        raise ValueError(f"Unexpected verifier primary status: {primary_status}")
   799	    return verdict
   800	
   801	
   802	def _coerce_state_like(state_like: SaverEnvironmentState | Dict[str, Any]) -> SaverEnvironmentState:
   803	    if isinstance(state_like, SaverEnvironmentState):
   804	        return state_like
   805	    payload = dict(state_like or {})
   806	    return SaverEnvironmentState(
   807	        visited_windows=list(payload.get("visited_windows") or []),
   808	        evidence_ledger=list(payload.get("evidence_ledger") or []),
   809	        verification_records=list(payload.get("verification_records") or []),
   810	        finalized_case=dict(payload["finalized_case"]) if isinstance(payload.get("finalized_case"), dict) else None,
   811	        last_claim=dict(payload["last_claim"]) if isinstance(payload.get("last_claim"), dict) else None,
   812	        active_evidence_window_ids=list(payload.get("active_evidence_window_ids") or []),
   813	        verifier_cache=list(payload.get("verifier_cache") or []),
   814	        next_evidence_id=int(payload.get("next_evidence_id") or 1),
   815	        next_window_id=int(payload.get("next_window_id") or 1),
   816	    )
   817	
   818	
   819	def _group_relative_advantages(records: List[Dict[str, Any]], *, eps: float = 1e-6) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
   820	    if not records:
   821	        return []
   822	    rewards = [float(record.get("branch_reward") or 0.0) for record in records]
   823	    mean_reward = sum(rewards) / float(len(rewards))
   824	    variance = sum((reward - mean_reward) ** 2 for reward in rewards) / float(len(rewards))
   825	    std_reward = variance ** 0.5
   826	    updated: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
   827	    for record, reward in zip(records, rewards):
   828	        local_advantage = 0.0 if std_reward <= eps else (reward - mean_reward) / (std_reward + eps)
   829	        enriched = dict(record)
   830	        enriched["local_advantage"] = round(float(local_advantage), 6)
   831	        enriched["group_reward_mean"] = round(float(mean_reward), 6)
   832	        enriched["group_reward_std"] = round(float(std_reward), 6)
   833	        updated.append(enriched)
   834	    return updated
   835	
   836	
   837	def _primary_status_bonus(primary_status: str) -> float:
   838	    return {
   839	        "complete": 0.3,
   840	        "incomplete": -0.2,
   841	        "redundant": -0.3,
   842	        "misaligned": -0.6,
   843	    }.get(str(primary_status), 0.0)
   844	
   845	
   846	def _evidence_ids_for_window_ids(state: SaverEnvironmentState, window_ids: Sequence[str]) -> List[str]:
   847	    selected = set(str(value) for value in window_ids or [])
   848	    if not selected:
   849	        return []
   850	    evidence_ids: List[str] = []
   851	    for entry in state.evidence_ledger:
   852	        window_id = str(entry.get("window_id") or "")
   853	        evidence_id = entry.get("evidence_id")
   854	        if window_id in selected and evidence_id:
   855	            evidence_ids.append(str(evidence_id))
   856	    return evidence_ids
   857	
   858	
   859	def _choose_minimal_subset_window_ids(
   860	    state: SaverEnvironmentState,

 succeeded in 0ms:
   340	        stage_selected.setdefault(stage, [])
   341	        if moment_id not in stage_selected[stage]:
   342	            stage_selected[stage].append(moment_id)
   343	    return moment_ids, stage_selected
   344	
   345	
   346	def _append_window(
   347	    state: SaverEnvironmentState,
   348	    *,
   349	    kind: str,
   350	    query: str | None,
   351	    query_normalized: str | None,
   352	    query_source: str | None,
   353	    moment_id: str | None,
   354	    role: str | None,
   355	    start_sec: float,
   356	    end_sec: float,
   357	    selected_indices: List[int],
   358	    fps: float,
   359	    record_as_evidence: bool = True,
   360	    search_anchor: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,
   361	    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,
   362	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   363	    window_id = f"w{state.next_window_id:04d}"
   364	    state.next_window_id += 1
   365	    evidence_id = f"e{state.next_evidence_id:04d}"
   366	    state.next_evidence_id += 1
   367	    entry = {
   368	        "window_id": window_id,
   369	        "evidence_id": evidence_id,
   370	        "kind": kind,
   371	        "query": query,
   372	        "query_normalized": query_normalized,
   373	        "query_source": query_source,
   374	        "moment_id": moment_id,
   375	        "role": role,
   376	        "start_sec": start_sec,
   377	        "end_sec": end_sec,
   378	        "selected_frame_indices": [int(index) for index in selected_indices],
   379	        "selected_timestamps": _indices_to_timestamps(selected_indices, fps),
   380	        "selected_frame_count": len(selected_indices),
   381	    }
   382	    if search_anchor:
   383	        entry["search_anchor"] = dict(search_anchor)
   384	    if metadata:
   385	        entry.update(dict(metadata))
   386	    state.visited_windows.append(entry)
   387	    if record_as_evidence:
   388	        state.evidence_ledger.append(entry)
   389	    return entry
   390	
   391	
   392	def _resolve_scene_text(multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
   393	    raw_scene = multimodal_cache.get("scene")
   394	    if isinstance(raw_scene, dict):
   395	        return str(raw_scene.get("scenario") or raw_scene.get("name") or "").strip()
   396	    if isinstance(raw_scene, str):
   397	        return raw_scene.strip()
   398	    return ""
   399	
   400	
   401	def _build_active_hypothesis_text(state: SaverEnvironmentState) -> str:
   402	    claim = dict(state.last_claim or {})
   403	    existence = str(claim.get("existence") or "").strip().lower()
   404	    category = str(claim.get("category") or "").strip().lower()
   405	    if existence == "normal":
   406	        return "checking whether the clip remains normal"
   407	    if existence == "anomaly" and category and category != "normal":
   408	        return f"possible {category}"
   409	    if category and category != "normal":
   410	        return f"possible {category}"
   411	    return ""
   412	
   413	
   414	def _latest_search_feedback(state: SaverEnvironmentState) -> str:
   415	    if not state.evidence_ledger:
   416	        return ""
   417	    latest = dict(state.evidence_ledger[-1] or {})
   418	    query = str(latest.get("query_normalized") or latest.get("query") or "").strip()
   419	    role = str(latest.get("role") or "").strip()
   420	    if query and role:
   421	        return f"previous search already checked {role} evidence for {query}"
   422	    if query:
   423	        return f"previous search already checked {query}"
   424	    return ""
   425	
   426	
   427	def _expected_stage_for_search(arguments: Dict[str, Any], state: SaverEnvironmentState) -> str:
   428	    role_stage = event_chain_stage_for_role(arguments.get("role"))
   429	    if role_stage:
   430	        return role_stage
   431	    if state.verification_records:
   432	        latest_verification = dict(state.verification_records[-1] or {})
   433	        missing_required_stages = list(latest_verification.get("missing_required_stages") or [])
   434	        if missing_required_stages:
   435	            return str(missing_required_stages[0]).strip()
   436	    return ""
   437	
   438	
   439	def _build_search_anchor(
   440	    arguments: Dict[str, Any],
   441	    *,
   442	    multimodal_cache: Dict[str, Any],
   443	    state: SaverEnvironmentState,
   444	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   445	    latest_verification = dict(state.verification_records[-1] or {}) if state.verification_records else {}
   446	    unresolved_targets = [
   447	        str(value).strip()
   448	        for value in list(latest_verification.get("missing_required_stages") or [])
   449	        if str(value).strip()
   450	    ]
   451	    anchor = {
   452	        "scene": _resolve_scene_text(multimodal_cache),
   453	        "active_hypothesis": _build_active_hypothesis_text(state),
   454	        "expected_stage": _expected_stage_for_search(arguments, state),
   455	        "unresolved_targets": unresolved_targets,
   456	        "resolved_evidence_summary": summarize_evidence_ledger(state.evidence_ledger),
   457	        "last_search_feedback": _latest_search_feedback(state),
   458	    }
   459	    cleaned_anchor: Dict[str, Any] = {}
   460	    for key, value in anchor.items():
   461	        if value is None:
   462	            continue
   463	        if isinstance(value, str) and not value:
   464	            continue
   465	        if isinstance(value, list) and not value:
   466	            continue
   467	        cleaned_anchor[key] = value
   468	    return cleaned_anchor
   469	
   470	
   471	def _has_self_verification_payload(arguments: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
   472	    return any(key in arguments for key in SELF_VERIFICATION_VERDICT_KEYS)
   473	
   474	
   475	def _normalize_verification_arguments(arguments: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   476	    normalized = dict(arguments or {})
   477	    normalized["verification_mode"] = normalize_self_verification_mode(
   478	        normalized.get("verification_mode"),
   479	        default="reward_only",
   480	        public_only=True,
   481	    )
   482	    if isinstance(normalized.get("claim"), dict):
   483	        normalized["claim"] = validate_canonical_category_payload(
   484	            normalized["claim"],
   485	            payload_name="claim",
   486	            require_category_for_anomaly=True,
   487	        )
   488	    return normalized
   489	
   490	
   491	def _resolve_selected_window_ids(
   492	    state: SaverEnvironmentState,
   493	    *,
   494	    selected_window_ids: List[str],
   495	    selected_evidence_ids: List[str],
   496	    selected_evidence_moment_ids: List[str],
   497	    candidate_window_ids: List[str],
   498	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   499	    requested_selected_window_ids = _dedupe_string_list(selected_window_ids)
   500	    selected_evidence_ids = _dedupe_string_list(selected_evidence_ids)
   501	    selected_evidence_moment_ids = _dedupe_string_list(selected_evidence_moment_ids)
   502	    candidate_window_ids = _dedupe_string_list(candidate_window_ids)
   503	    raw_window_selector_ids = _dedupe_string_list(requested_selected_window_ids + candidate_window_ids)
   504	
   505	    resolved: List[str] = []
   506	    seen = set()
   507	    invalid_selected_window_ids: List[str] = []
   508	    resolution_sources: List[str] = []
   509	    valid_window_ids = {
   510	        str(entry.get("window_id")).strip()
   511	        for entry in state.evidence_ledger
   512	        if str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
   513	    }
   514	    by_evidence_id = {
   515	        str(entry.get("evidence_id")): entry for entry in state.evidence_ledger if entry.get("evidence_id")
   516	    }
   517	    by_moment_id: Dict[str, List[Dict[str, Any]]] = {}
   518	    for entry in state.evidence_ledger:
   519	        moment_id = entry.get("moment_id")
   520	        if moment_id is None:
   521	            continue
   522	        by_moment_id.setdefault(str(moment_id), []).append(entry)
   523	
   524	    selected_window_added = False
   525	    for raw_window_id in requested_selected_window_ids:
   526	        if raw_window_id not in valid_window_ids:
   527	            if raw_window_id not in invalid_selected_window_ids:
   528	                invalid_selected_window_ids.append(raw_window_id)
   529	            continue
   530	        if raw_window_id not in seen:
   531	            seen.add(raw_window_id)
   532	            resolved.append(raw_window_id)
   533	            selected_window_added = True
   534	    if selected_window_added:
   535	        resolution_sources.append("selected_window_ids")
   536	
   537	    evidence_added = False
   538	    for evidence_id in selected_evidence_ids:
   539	        entry = by_evidence_id.get(str(evidence_id))
   540	        if entry is None:
   541	            continue
   542	        window_id = str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
   543	        if window_id and window_id not in seen:
   544	            seen.add(window_id)
   545	            resolved.append(window_id)
   546	            evidence_added = True
   547	    if evidence_added:
   548	        resolution_sources.append("selected_evidence_ids")
   549	
   550	    moment_added = False
   551	    for moment_id in selected_evidence_moment_ids:
   552	        for entry in by_moment_id.get(str(moment_id), []):
   553	            window_id = str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
   554	            if window_id and window_id not in seen:
   555	                seen.add(window_id)
   556	                resolved.append(window_id)
   557	                moment_added = True
   558	    if moment_added:
   559	        resolution_sources.append("selected_evidence_moment_ids")
   560	
   561	    valid_candidate_window_ids: List[str] = []
   562	    candidate_added = False
   563	    candidate_fallback_allowed = not resolved
   564	    for window_id in candidate_window_ids:
   565	        if window_id not in valid_window_ids:
   566	            continue
   567	        if window_id not in valid_candidate_window_ids:
   568	            valid_candidate_window_ids.append(window_id)
   569	        if not candidate_fallback_allowed:
   570	            continue
   571	        if window_id not in seen:
   572	            seen.add(window_id)
   573	            resolved.append(window_id)
   574	            candidate_added = True
   575	    if candidate_added:
   576	        resolution_sources.append("candidate_window_ids")
   577	
   578	    selection_requested = bool(
   579	        requested_selected_window_ids or selected_evidence_ids or selected_evidence_moment_ids or candidate_window_ids
   580	    )
   581	    # Fallback: when nothing resolves but evidence exists in ledger, auto-select all evidence windows
   582	    if not resolved and valid_window_ids:
   583	        for fallback_window_id in sorted(valid_window_ids):
   584	            if fallback_window_id not in seen:
   585	                seen.add(fallback_window_id)
   586	                resolved.append(fallback_window_id)
   587	        if resolved:
   588	            resolution_sources.append("auto_fallback_from_ledger")
   589	
   590	    if resolution_sources:
   591	        selection_resolution_source = "+".join(resolution_sources)
   592	    elif selection_requested:
   593	        selection_resolution_source = "unresolved"
   594	    else:
   595	        selection_resolution_source = "none"
   596	
   597	    return {
   598	        "resolved_window_ids": resolved,
   599	        "requested_selected_window_ids": requested_selected_window_ids,
   600	        "invalid_selected_window_ids": invalid_selected_window_ids,
   601	        "selection_resolution_source": selection_resolution_source,
   602	        "selection_requested": selection_requested,
   603	        "selection_unresolved": bool(selection_requested and not resolved),
   604	        "selected_evidence_ids": selected_evidence_ids,
   605	        "selected_evidence_moment_ids": selected_evidence_moment_ids,
   606	        "valid_candidate_window_ids": valid_candidate_window_ids,
   607	        "window_selector_ids": raw_window_selector_ids,
   608	    }
   609	
   610	
   611	def _finalize_verification_payload(
   612	    verification: Dict[str, Any],
   613	    *,
   614	    selection_info: Dict[str, Any],
   615	    verification_parse_mode: str,
   616	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   617	    finalized = dict(verification or {})
   618	    finalized["verified_window_ids"] = _dedupe_string_list(finalized.get("verified_window_ids") or [])
   619	    finalized["best_effort_window_ids"] = _dedupe_string_list(finalized.get("best_effort_window_ids") or [])
   620	    if finalized.get("self_verification_selected_window_ids") is not None:
   621	        finalized["self_verification_selected_window_ids"] = _dedupe_string_list(
   622	            finalized.get("self_verification_selected_window_ids") or []
   623	        )
   624	
   625	    failure_reasons = _dedupe_string_list(finalized.get("failure_reasons") or [])
   626	    if bool(selection_info.get("selection_unresolved")):
   627	        failure_reasons = _dedupe_string_list(
   628	            failure_reasons + ["selected_evidence_not_resolved_to_known_windows"]
   629	        )
   630	        finalized["verified_window_ids"] = []
   631	        finalized["best_effort_window_ids"] = []
   632	        if finalized.get("self_verification_selected_window_ids") is not None:
   633	            finalized["self_verification_selected_window_ids"] = []
   634	    finalized["failure_reasons"] = failure_reasons
   635	    finalized["verification_parse_mode"] = str(verification_parse_mode)
   636	    finalized["requested_selected_window_ids"] = list(selection_info.get("requested_selected_window_ids") or [])
   637	    finalized["invalid_selected_window_ids"] = list(selection_info.get("invalid_selected_window_ids") or [])
   638	    finalized["selection_resolution_source"] = str(selection_info.get("selection_resolution_source") or "none")
   639	    return finalized
   640	
   641	
   642	def scan_timeline(arguments: Dict[str, Any], multimodal_cache: Dict, state: SaverEnvironmentState):
   643	    start_sec, end_sec, selected_indices, fps = _resolve_window(arguments, multimodal_cache)
   644	    entry = _append_window(
   645	        state,
   646	        kind="scan",
   647	        query=arguments.get("purpose"),
   648	        query_normalized=normalize_query_text(str(arguments.get("purpose") or "")),
   649	        query_source="scan_purpose",
   650	        moment_id=None,
   651	        role=None,
   652	        start_sec=start_sec,
   653	        end_sec=end_sec,
   654	        selected_indices=selected_indices,
   655	        fps=fps,
   656	        record_as_evidence=False,
   657	        search_anchor=None,
   658	        metadata={
   659	            "proposal_backend": "uniform",
   660	            "feature_cache_used": False,
   661	            "proposal_candidate_count": 0,
   662	            "proposal_candidate_frame_indices": [int(index) for index in selected_indices],
   663	            "proposal_candidate_frame_scores": [],
   664	            "proposal_candidate_windows": [],
   665	            "selected_frame_scores": [],
   666	            "proposal_fallback_reason": "scan_timeline_uniform",
   667	        },
   668	    )
   669	    footer = (
   670	        f"Scanned timeline window [{start_sec:.3f}, {end_sec:.3f}] and selected "
   671	        f"{len(selected_indices)} frames."
   672	    )
   673	    return _build_visual_content(selected_indices, multimodal_cache, footer), state, entry
   674	
   675	
   676	def seek_evidence(arguments: Dict[str, Any], multimodal_cache: Dict, state: SaverEnvironmentState):
   677	    start_sec, end_sec, selected_indices, fps = _resolve_window(arguments, multimodal_cache)
   678	    query = str(arguments.get("query") or "").strip()
   679	    search_anchor = _build_search_anchor(arguments, multimodal_cache=multimodal_cache, state=state)
   680	    feature_cache = coerce_feature_cache_payload(
   681	        multimodal_cache.get("embedding"),
   682	        fps=fps,
   683	        frame_indices=multimodal_cache.get("frame_indices") or [],
   684	    )
   685	    if bool(multimodal_cache.get("strict_feature_guided_proposal")):
   686	        if feature_cache is None:
   687	            raise ValueError(
   688	                "seek_evidence requires feature_cache when strict_feature_guided_proposal is enabled."
   689	            )
   690	        if multimodal_cache.get("proposal_runtime") is None:
   691	            raise ValueError(
   692	                "seek_evidence requires proposal_runtime when strict_feature_guided_proposal is enabled."
   693	            )
   694	    proposal_metadata = feature_guided_frame_proposal(
   695	        feature_cache=feature_cache,
   696	        proposal_runtime=multimodal_cache.get("proposal_runtime"),
   697	        query=query,
   698	        query_package=None,
   699	        role=str(arguments.get("role") or ""),
   700	        search_anchor=search_anchor,
   701	        start_sec=start_sec,
   702	        end_sec=end_sec,
   703	        fps=fps,
   704	        num_frames=int(arguments.get("num_frames") or 0),
   705	        top_k_candidates=int(arguments.get("top_k_candidates") or 8),
   706	        candidate_merge_gap_sec=float(arguments.get("candidate_merge_gap_sec") or 1.0),
   707	        query_source=str(arguments.get("query_source") or "model"),
   708	    )
   709	    if proposal_metadata.get("selected_frame_indices"):
   710	        selected_indices = [int(index) for index in proposal_metadata["selected_frame_indices"]]
   711	    else:
   712	        proposal_metadata["selected_frame_indices"] = [int(index) for index in selected_indices]
   713	    entry = _append_window(
   714	        state,
   715	        kind="evidence",
   716	        query=query,
   717	        query_normalized=str(proposal_metadata.get("query_normalized") or normalize_query_text(query)),
   718	        query_source=str(proposal_metadata.get("query_source") or arguments.get("query_source") or "model"),
   719	        moment_id=str(arguments.get("moment_id")) if arguments.get("moment_id") is not None else None,
   720	        role=str(arguments.get("role")) if arguments.get("role") is not None else None,
   721	        start_sec=start_sec,
   722	        end_sec=end_sec,
   723	        selected_indices=selected_indices,
   724	        fps=fps,
   725	        record_as_evidence=True,
   726	        search_anchor=search_anchor,
   727	        metadata=proposal_metadata,
   728	    )
   729	    evidence_window_id = str(entry.get("window_id") or "").strip()
   730	    evidence_id = str(entry.get("evidence_id") or "").strip()
   731	    moment_id = str(entry.get("moment_id") or "").strip()
   732	    role = str(entry.get("role") or "").strip()
   733	    registration_parts = []
   734	    if evidence_window_id:
   735	        registration_parts.append(f"window_id={evidence_window_id}")
   736	    if evidence_id:
   737	        registration_parts.append(f"evidence_id={evidence_id}")
   738	    if role:
   739	        registration_parts.append(f"role={role}")
   740	    if moment_id:
   741	        registration_parts.append(f"moment_id={moment_id}")
   742	    verification_hint = ""
   743	    if evidence_window_id:
   744	        verification_hint = f' For verify_hypothesis use selected_window_ids=["{evidence_window_id}"].'
   745	        if moment_id:
   746	            verification_hint += f' You may also include selected_evidence_moment_ids=["{moment_id}"].'
   747	    ledger_summary = summarize_evidence_ledger(state.evidence_ledger)
   748	    stage_hint = str(search_anchor.get("expected_stage") or role or "").strip()
   749	    stage_hint_text = f" Stage hint: {stage_hint}." if stage_hint else ""
   750	    footer = (
   751	        f"Evidence registered: {' '.join(registration_parts)}. "
   752	        f"Query='{query}'. Window [{start_sec:.3f}, {end_sec:.3f}]. Selected {len(selected_indices)} frames."
   753	        f"{verification_hint}"
   754	        f"{stage_hint_text}"
   755	        f" {ledger_summary}"
   756	    )
   757	    return _build_visual_content(selected_indices, multimodal_cache, footer), state, entry
   758	
   759	
   760	def verify_hypothesis(arguments: Dict[str, Any], multimodal_cache: Dict, state: SaverEnvironmentState):
   761	    arguments = _normalize_verification_arguments(arguments)
   762	    selected_window_ids = [str(value) for value in (arguments.get("selected_window_ids") or []) if str(value).strip()]
   763	    selected_evidence_ids = [str(value) for value in (arguments.get("selected_evidence_ids") or []) if str(value).strip()]
   764	    selected_evidence_moment_ids = [
   765	        str(value)
   766	        for value in (
   767	            arguments.get("selected_evidence_moment_ids")
   768	            or arguments.get("evidence_moment_ids")
   769	            or []
   770	        )
   771	        if str(value).strip()
   772	    ]
   773	    candidate_window_ids = [str(value) for value in (arguments.get("candidate_window_ids") or []) if str(value).strip()]
   774	    candidate_evidence_ids = [
   775	        str(value)
   776	        for value in (arguments.get("candidate_evidence_ids") or arguments.get("evidence_ids") or [])
   777	        if str(value).strip()
   778	    ]
   779	    candidate_evidence_moment_ids = [
   780	        str(value)
   781	        for value in (
   782	            arguments.get("candidate_evidence_moment_ids")
   783	            or arguments.get("evidence_moment_ids")
   784	            or arguments.get("selected_evidence_moment_ids")
   785	            or []
   786	        )
   787	        if str(value).strip()
   788	    ]
   789	    selection_info = _resolve_selected_window_ids(
   790	        state,
   791	        selected_window_ids=selected_window_ids,
   792	        selected_evidence_ids=selected_evidence_ids,
   793	        selected_evidence_moment_ids=selected_evidence_moment_ids,
   794	        candidate_window_ids=candidate_window_ids,
   795	    )
   796	
   797	    has_self_verification_payload = _has_self_verification_payload(arguments)
   798	
   799	    if has_self_verification_payload:
   800	        payload = dict(arguments)
   801	        payload["selected_window_ids"] = list(selection_info["resolved_window_ids"])
   802	        payload["selected_evidence_ids"] = list(selection_info["selected_evidence_ids"])
   803	        payload["selected_evidence_moment_ids"] = list(selection_info["selected_evidence_moment_ids"])
   804	        payload["candidate_window_ids"] = list(selection_info["valid_candidate_window_ids"])
   805	        payload = validate_policy_self_verification_payload(payload)
   806	        verification = parse_self_verification_payload(
   807	            payload,
   808	            fallback_claim=arguments.get("claim") or state.last_claim or {},
   809	            verification_mode=str(arguments.get("verification_mode") or "reward_only"),
   810	        )
   811	        verification = _finalize_verification_payload(
   812	            verification,
   813	            selection_info=selection_info,
   814	            verification_parse_mode="self_report",
   815	        )
   816	    else:
   817	        raise ValueError(
   818	            "verify_hypothesis must provide a verdict-bearing self-verification payload."
   819	        )
   820	    state.last_claim = dict(verification.get("claim") or {})
   821	    state.active_evidence_window_ids = list(
   822	        verification.get("verified_window_ids") or verification.get("best_effort_window_ids") or []
   823	    )
   824	    state.verification_records.append(verification)
   825	    state.verifier_cache.append(verification)
   826	    content = [{"type": "text", "text": json.dumps(verification, ensure_ascii=False)}]
   827	    return content, state, verification
   828	
   829	
   830	def finalize_case(arguments: Dict[str, Any], multimodal_cache: Dict, state: SaverEnvironmentState):
   831	    decision_arguments, semantic_answer = split_finalize_case_payload(arguments)
   832	    decision_arguments = validate_canonical_category_payload(
   833	        decision_arguments,
   834	        payload_name="finalize_case",
   835	        require_category_for_anomaly=True,
   836	    )
   837	    resolved_moment_ids, resolved_stage_selected_moment_ids = _resolve_finalized_moment_ids_from_state(
   838	        decision_arguments=decision_arguments,
   839	        multimodal_cache=multimodal_cache,
   840	        state=state,
   841	    )
   842	    if resolved_moment_ids:
   843	        decision_arguments["evidence_moment_ids"] = list(resolved_moment_ids)
   844	    elif "evidence_moment_ids" in decision_arguments:
   845	        decision_arguments["evidence_moment_ids"] = []
   846	    if resolved_stage_selected_moment_ids:
   847	        decision_arguments["stage_selected_moment_ids"] = {
   848	            stage: list(moment_ids)
   849	            for stage, moment_ids in resolved_stage_selected_moment_ids.items()
   850	        }
   851	        resolved_covered_stages = [stage for stage, moment_ids in resolved_stage_selected_moment_ids.items() if moment_ids]
   852	        decision_arguments["covered_stages"] = resolved_covered_stages
   853	        current_missing = _dedupe_string_list(list(decision_arguments.get("missing_required_stages") or []))
   854	        if current_missing:
   855	            decision_arguments["missing_required_stages"] = [
   856	                stage for stage in current_missing if stage not in resolved_covered_stages
   857	            ]
   858	    normalized_arguments = dict(arguments or {})
   859	    normalized_arguments.update(decision_arguments)
   860	    if semantic_answer is not None:
   861	        normalized_arguments["summary"] = semantic_answer.get("summary")
   862	        normalized_arguments["rationale"] = semantic_answer.get("rationale")
   863	        normalized_arguments["event_chain_summary"] = dict(semantic_answer.get("event_chain_summary") or {})
   864	        normalized_arguments["qa_focus_answers"] = dict(semantic_answer.get("qa_focus_answers") or {})
   865	    schema = augment_finalize_case_schema(multimodal_cache.get("tool_io", {}).get("finalize_case_schema"))
   866	    validate_required_fields(normalized_arguments, schema)
   867	    state.finalized_case = dict(decision_arguments)
   868	    state.finalized_semantic_answer = dict(semantic_answer) if isinstance(semantic_answer, dict) else None
   869	    state.last_claim = dict(decision_arguments)
   870	    response_payload: Dict[str, Any] = {"status": "finalized", "finalized_case": state.finalized_case}
   871	    if isinstance(state.finalized_semantic_answer, dict):
   872	        response_payload["semantic_answer"] = dict(state.finalized_semantic_answer)
   873	    content = [
   874	        {
   875	            "type": "text",
   876	            "text": json.dumps(response_payload, ensure_ascii=False),
   877	        }
   878	    ]
   879	    return content, state, state.finalized_case

     3	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
     4	from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional

     7	@dataclass
     8	class SaverEnvironmentState:
     9	    visited_windows: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
    10	    evidence_ledger: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
    11	    verification_records: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
    12	    finalized_case: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
    13	    finalized_semantic_answer: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
    14	    last_claim: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
    15	    active_evidence_window_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    20	
    21	def validate_required_fields(payload: Dict[str, Any], schema: Optional[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:
    22	    if not schema:
    23	        return
    24	    required = schema.get("required", [])
    25	    missing = [field_name for field_name in required if field_name not in payload]
    26	    if missing:
    27	        raise ValueError(f"Missing required finalize_case fields: {missing}")
    28	    properties = schema.get("properties") or {}
    29	    for field_name, field_schema in properties.items():
    30	        if field_name not in payload:
    31	            continue
    32	        _validate_schema_value(payload[field_name], field_schema, field_name)
    33	
    34	
    35	def _validate_schema_value(value: Any, schema: Dict[str, Any], field_name: str) -> None:
    36	    if not schema:
    37	        return
    38	    if "oneOf" in schema:
    39	        errors: List[str] = []
    40	        for option in schema.get("oneOf") or []:
    41	            try:
    42	                _validate_schema_value(value, option, field_name)
    43	                return
    44	            except ValueError as exc:
    45	                errors.append(str(exc))
    46	        raise ValueError(errors[0] if errors else f"Invalid value for {field_name!r}.")
    47	
    48	    expected_type = schema.get("type")
    49	    if expected_type == "null":
    50	        if value is not None:
    51	            raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be null.")
    52	        return
    53	    if expected_type == "string":
    54	        if not isinstance(value, str):
    55	            raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a string.")
    56	    elif expected_type == "number":
    57	        if not isinstance(value, (int, float)) or isinstance(value, bool):
    58	            raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be a number.")
    59	    elif expected_type == "integer":
    60	        if not isinstance(value, int) or isinstance(value, bool):
    61	            raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be an integer.")
    62	    elif expected_type == "array":
    63	        if not isinstance(value, list):
    64	            raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be an array.")
    65	        min_items = schema.get("minItems")
    66	        max_items = schema.get("maxItems")
    67	        if min_items is not None and len(value) < int(min_items):
    68	            raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must contain at least {int(min_items)} items.")
    69	        if max_items is not None and len(value) > int(max_items):
    70	            raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must contain at most {int(max_items)} items.")
    71	        item_schema = schema.get("items") or {}
    72	        for index, item in enumerate(value):
    73	            _validate_schema_value(item, item_schema, f"{field_name}[{index}]")
    74	    elif expected_type == "object":
    75	        if not isinstance(value, dict):
    76	            raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be an object.")
    77	
    78	    enum_values = schema.get("enum")
    79	    if enum_values is not None and value not in enum_values:
    80	        raise ValueError(f"{field_name} must be one of {list(enum_values)}, got {value!r}.")

   328	        compact["stage_selected_moment_ids"] = stage_selected_moment_ids

   331	    if include_rationale and rationale:
   332	        compact["rationale"] = rationale
   333

   337	def build_self_verification_tool_schema() -> Dict[str, Any]:
   338	    claim_schema = {
   339	        "type": "object",
   340	        "properties": {
   341	            "existence": {"type": "string", "enum": ["normal", "anomaly"]},
   342	            "category": {"type": "string", "enum": list(CANONICAL_POLICY_CATEGORIES)},
   343	            "earliest_actionable_sec": {"oneOf": [{"type": "null"}, {"type": "number"}]},
   344	        },
   345	    }
   346	    return {
   347	        "type": "object",
   348	        "properties": {
   349	            "verification_mode": {
   350	                "type": "string",
   351	                "enum": sorted(PUBLIC_SELF_VERIFICATION_MODES),
   352	            },
   353	            "selected_window_ids": {
   354	                "type": "array",
   355	                "items": {"type": "string"},
   356	                "minItems": 1,
   357	            },
   358	            "selected_evidence_moment_ids": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}},
   359	            "covered_stages": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string", "enum": list(EVENT_CHAIN_STAGES)}},
   360	            "missing_required_stages": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string", "enum": list(EVENT_CHAIN_STAGES)}},
   361	            "stage_selected_moment_ids": build_stage_selected_moment_ids_schema(),
   362	            "claim": claim_schema,
   363	            "query": {"type": "string"},
   364	            "verification_decision": {"type": "string", "enum": sorted(SELF_VERIFICATION_DECISIONS)},
   365	            "recommended_action": {"type": "string", "enum": sorted(SELF_VERIFICATION_ACTIONS)},
   366	            "sufficiency_score": {"type": "number"},
   367	            "necessity_score": {"type": "number"},
   368	            "finalize_readiness_score": {"type": "number"},
   369	            "counterfactual_faithfulness": {"type": "number"},
   370	            "rationale": {"type": "string"},
   371	        },
   372	        "required": list(POLICY_SELF_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED_FIELDS),

     8	
     9	def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
    10	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Train SAVER RL with the TRL + vLLM GRPO route under DeepSpeed/torchrun.")
    11	    parser.add_argument("--config", required=True)
    12	    parser.add_argument("--model-config", required=True)
    13	    parser.add_argument("--attention-config", required=True)
    14	    parser.add_argument("--deepspeed-config", default="")
    15	    parser.add_argument("--local_rank", "--local-rank", dest="local_rank", type=int, default=-1, help=argparse.SUPPRESS)
    16	    parser.add_argument(
    17	        "--override",
    18	        action="append",
    19	        default=[],
    20	        help="Optional dotted.key=value override applied to the main YAML config before launch.",
    21	    )
    22	    return parser.parse_args()
    23	
    24	
    25	def main() -> None:
    26	    args = parse_args()
    27	    job = RLJobConfig.from_files(
    28	        config_path=args.config,
    29	        model_config_path=args.model_config,
    30	        attention_config_path=args.attention_config,
    31	        deepspeed_config_path=args.deepspeed_config or None,
    32	        config_overrides=args.override,
    33	    )
    34	    result = run_rl_job(job)
    35	    print(json.dumps(result.to_dict(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, sort_keys=True))
    36	
    37	
    38	if __name__ == "__main__":
    39	    main()

   904	def _is_episode_feature_from_feature(feature: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
   905	    return isinstance(feature.get("messages"), list) and isinstance(feature.get("assistant_supervision"), list)

   907	
   908	def _compute_group_relative_advantages(
   909	    rollouts: Sequence[Dict[str, Any]],
   910	    *,
   911	    clip_value: Optional[float] = None,
   912	    eps: float = 1e-6,
   913	    sample_partition_multipliers: Optional[Dict[str, float]] = None,
   914	) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
   915	    rewards = [float(((rollout.get("reward_summary") or {}).get("total_reward")) or 0.0) for rollout in rollouts]
   916	    sample_partitions = [_resolve_sample_partition(rollout) for rollout in rollouts]
   917	    mean_reward = sum(rewards) / float(len(rewards)) if rewards else 0.0
   918	    variance = sum((reward - mean_reward) ** 2 for reward in rewards) / float(len(rewards)) if rewards else 0.0
   919	    std_reward = math.sqrt(max(variance, 0.0))
   920	    updated: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
   921	    for rollout, reward, sample_partition in zip(rollouts, rewards, sample_partitions):
   922	        reward_summary = dict(rollout.get("reward_summary") or {})
   923	        advantage = 0.0 if std_reward <= eps else (reward - mean_reward) / (std_reward + eps)
   924	        advantage_source = "zero_advantage" if std_reward <= eps else "group_relative"
   925	        if clip_value is not None:
   926	            advantage = max(-float(clip_value), min(float(clip_value), float(advantage)))
   927	        enriched = copy.deepcopy(rollout)
   928	        enriched["group_reward"] = float(reward)
   929	        enriched["group_reward_mean"] = float(mean_reward)
   930	        enriched["group_reward_std"] = float(std_reward)
   931	        enriched["group_advantage"] = round(float(advantage), 6)
   932	        enriched["advantage_source"] = str(advantage_source)
   933	        enriched["sample_partition"] = str(sample_partition)
   934	        enriched["sample_partition_multiplier"] = round(
   935	            float(
   936	                _resolve_sample_partition_multiplier(
   937	                    sample_partition=str(sample_partition),
   938	                    reward_summary=reward_summary,
   939	                    sample_partition_multipliers=sample_partition_multipliers,
   940	                )
   941	            ),
   942	            6,
   943	        )
   944	        updated.append(enriched)
   945	    return updated
   946

   948	def _log_rollout_reward_diagnostics(
   949	    *,
   950	    video_id: str,
   951	    rollouts: Sequence[Dict[str, Any]],
   952	    min_weight: float,
   953	) -> None:
   954	    if not rollouts:
   955	        runtime_log(
   956	            f"rl reward/advantage debug: video_id={video_id} rollout_count=0 min_weight={float(min_weight):.6f}",
   957	            runtime=distributed_runtime_from_env(),
   958	            main_process_only=False,
   959	        )
   960	        return
   961	    reward_values = [round(float(((rollout.get("reward_summary") or {}).get("total_reward")) or 0.0), 6) for rollout in rollouts]
   962	    advantage_values = [round(float(rollout.get("group_advantage", 0.0) or 0.0), 6) for rollout in rollouts]
   963	    advantage_sources = [str(rollout.get("advantage_source") or "") for rollout in rollouts]
   964	    sample_partitions = [str(rollout.get("sample_partition") or "") for rollout in rollouts]
   965	    reward_mean = sum(reward_values) / float(len(reward_values))
   966	    reward_variance = sum((value - reward_mean) ** 2 for value in reward_values) / float(len(reward_values))
   967	    reward_std = math.sqrt(max(reward_variance, 0.0))
   968	    filtered_count = sum(1 for value in advantage_values if abs(float(value)) < float(min_weight))
   969	    zero_advantage_count = sum(1 for value in advantage_values if abs(float(value)) <= 1e-8)
   970	    fecv_failed_count = sum(1 for rollout in rollouts if bool(rollout.get("fecv_failed")))
   971	    generation_ids = [int(rollout.get("generation_id", -1) or -1) for rollout in rollouts]
   972	    runtime_log(
   973	        "rl reward/advantage debug: "
   974	        f"video_id={video_id} "
   975	        f"rollout_count={len(rollouts)} "
   976	        f"generation_ids={generation_ids} "
   977	        f"min_weight={float(min_weight):.6f} "
   978	        f"filtered_below_min_weight={int(filtered_count)} "
   979	        f"zero_advantage_count={int(zero_advantage_count)} "
   980	        f"fecv_failed_count={int(fecv_failed_count)} "
   981	        f"reward_mean={float(reward_mean):.6f} "
   982	        f"reward_std={float(reward_std):.6f} "
   983	        f"reward_values={[f'{value:.6f}' for value in reward_values]} "
   984	        f"advantages={[f'{value:.6f}' for value in advantage_values]} "
   985	        f"advantage_sources={advantage_sources} "
   986	        f"sample_partitions={sample_partitions}",
   987	        runtime=distributed_runtime_from_env(),
   988	        main_process_only=False,
   989	    )
   990	    component_rows = []

  1281	            count = int(state.get("count") or 0)
  1282	            reward_f = float(reward)
  1283	            if count <= 0:
  1284	                mean = reward_f
  1285	                sq_mean = reward_f * reward_f
  1286	            else:
  1287	                mean = decay * float(state.get("mean") or 0.0) + (1.0 - decay) * reward_f
  1288	                sq_mean = decay * float(state.get("sq_mean") or 0.0) + (1.0 - decay) * (reward_f * reward_f)
  1289	            state["count"] = float(count + 1)
  1290	            state["mean"] = float(mean)
  1291	            state["sq_mean"] = float(sq_mean)

  1293	    def _apply_zero_variance_advantage_fallback(
  1294	        self,
  1295	        rollouts: Sequence[Dict[str, Any]],
  1296	        *,
  1297	        eps: float = 1e-6,
  1298	    ) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
  1299	        updated: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
  1300	        if not rollouts:
  1301	            return updated
  1302	        group_std = float((rollouts[0] or {}).get("group_reward_std") or 0.0)
  1303	        for rollout in rollouts:
  1304	            enriched = copy.deepcopy(rollout)
  1305	            reward_summary = dict(enriched.get("reward_summary") or {})
  1306	            partition = str(enriched.get("sample_partition") or self._classify_rollout_partition(enriched))
  1307	            reward = float(reward_summary.get("total_reward") or 0.0)
  1308	            advantage = float(enriched.get("group_advantage") or 0.0)
  1309	            advantage_source = str(enriched.get("advantage_source") or "group_relative")
  1310	            fallback_partition = ""
  1311	            fallback_mean = 0.0
  1312	            fallback_std = 0.0
  1313	            if group_std <= float(eps):
  1314	                if partition == "easy_normal":
  1315	                    advantage = 0.0
  1316	                    advantage_source = "zero_easy_normal"
  1317	                else:
  1318	                    baseline_partition = partition
  1319	                    baseline_mean, baseline_std, baseline_count = self._reward_baseline_stats(partition)
  1320	                    if baseline_count < int(self._advantage_partition_min_history):
  1321	                        baseline_partition = "__global__"
  1322	                        baseline_mean, baseline_std, baseline_count = self._reward_baseline_stats("__global__")
  1323	                    if baseline_count <= 0:
  1324	                        baseline_mean = 0.0
  1325	                        baseline_std = 1.0
  1326	                        advantage = float(reward)
  1327	                        advantage_source = "ema_fallback"
  1328	                        fallback_partition = baseline_partition
  1329	                        fallback_mean = float(baseline_mean)
  1330	                        fallback_std = float(baseline_std)
  1331	                    else:
  1332	                        denom = max(float(baseline_std), 0.05)

   440	        return asdict(self)

   443	def _append_flag(argv: list[str], flag: str, value: str | None) -> None:
   444	    if value is None:
   445	        return
   446	    text = str(value).strip()
   447	    if text:
   448	        argv.extend([flag, text])

   524	
   525	def run_rl_job(job: RLJobConfig) -> RLRunResult:
   526	    if not job.train_manifest:
   527	        raise ValueError("RL train manifest is required")
   528	    if not job.policy_init_from:
   529	        raise ValueError("RL policy_init_from is required")
   530	    ensure_fa3_training_ready(require_gpu=True)
   531	    output_dir = Path(job.output_dir).expanduser().resolve()
   532	    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   533	    argv = build_active_rl_trl_argv(job)
   534	    launch_manifest_path = write_json(
   535	        {
   536	            "entrypoint": "train_saver_rl_trl.py",
   537	            "episode_grpo_pure_pack": True,
   538	            "use_liger_loss": False,
   539	            "rl_replay_buffer_supported": False,
   540	            "rl_replay_buffer_mode": "disabled_episode_grpo",
   541	            "argv": argv,
   542	            "config": job.to_dict(),
   543	            "requested_deepspeed_config_path": job.requested_deepspeed_config_path,
   544	            "effective_deepspeed_config_path": job.deepspeed_config_path,
   545	            "liger_deepspeed_auto_switched": bool(job.liger_deepspeed_auto_switched),
   546	            "liger_deepspeed_switch_reason": str(job.liger_deepspeed_switch_reason or ""),
   547	        },
   548	        output_dir / "rl_launch_manifest.json",
   549	    )
   550	    result = legacy_train_saver_rl_trl.main(argv)
   551	    summary_payload = dict(result or {})
   552	    summary_payload.update(
   553	        {
   554	            "run_name": job.run_name,
   555	            "output_dir": str(output_dir),
   556	            "entrypoint": "train_saver_rl_trl.py",
   557	            "episode_grpo_pure_pack": True,
   558	            "use_liger_loss": False,
   559	            "rl_replay_buffer_supported": False,
   560	            "rl_replay_buffer_mode": "disabled_episode_grpo",
   561	            "launch_manifest_path": str(launch_manifest_path),
   562	        }
   563	    )
   564	    summary_path = write_json(summary_payload, output_dir / "rl_summary.json")
   565	    return RLRunResult(
   566	        run_name=job.run_name,
   567	        output_dir=str(output_dir),
   568	        supported=True,
   569	        latest_checkpoint=str(summary_payload.get("latest_checkpoint") or ""),
   570	        summary_path=str(summary_path),
   571	        launch_manifest_path=str(launch_manifest_path),
   572	        notes=[
   573	            "RL now dispatches through the TRL + vLLM GRPO route.",
   574	            f"reference_model_mode=per_iteration_trainer_init source={job.policy_init_from}",
   575	            f"deepspeed={job.deepspeed_config_path or '(none)'}",
   576	            *(
   577	                [
   578	                    f"requested_deepspeed={job.requested_deepspeed_config_path or '(none)'}",
   579	                    f"liger_deepspeed_auto_switched=true reason={job.liger_deepspeed_switch_reason}",
   580	                ]
   581	                if bool(job.liger_deepspeed_auto_switched)
   582	                else []
   583	            ),
   584	        ],
   585	    )

    10	from saver_v3.common.experiment_logging import resolve_experiment_log_dir, utc_timestamp, write_json
    11	from saver_v3.common.runtime import distributed_barrier
    12	from saver_v3.rl import cli_shared

    16	def _build_vllm_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    17	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(add_help=False)
    18	    parser.add_argument(
    19	        "--vllm-tensor-parallel-size",
    20	        type=int,
    21	        default=1,
    22	        help="Tensor parallel size for colocated vLLM workers.",
    23	    )
    24	    parser.add_argument(
    25	        "--vllm-gpu-memory-utilization",
    26	        type=float,
    27	        default=0.35,
    28	        help="GPU memory utilization target for colocated vLLM workers.",
    29	    )
    30	    parser.add_argument(
    31	        "--vllm-guided-decoding-regex",
    32	        default="",
    33	        help="Optional guided decoding regex passed through the vLLM route.",
    34	    )
    35	    parser.add_argument("--materialized-train-items-path", default="", help="Optional materialized runtime-items cache for RL training.")
    36	    parser.add_argument("--materialized-eval-items-path", default="", help="Optional materialized runtime-items cache for RL eval/reference flows.")
    37	    parser.add_argument("--require-materialized-runtime-cache", type=cli_shared._parse_bool_flag, default=False)
    38	    parser.add_argument(
    39	        "--vllm-max-num-seqs",
    40	        type=int,
    41	        default=4,
    42	        help="RL-only explicit max_num_seqs override for the vLLM runtime. Defaults to 4.",
    43	    )
    44	    parser.add_argument(
    45	        "--vllm-fallback-max-num-seqs",
    46	        type=int,
    47	        default=2,
    48	        help="RL-only fallback max_num_seqs used when vLLM init fails due to GPU memory pressure. Defaults to 2.",
    49	    )
    50	    return parser
    51	
    52	
    53	def parse_args(argv: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
    54	    raw_argv = list(argv) if argv is not None else list(sys.argv[1:])
    55	    cli_shared.fail_on_removed_active_rl_flags(raw_argv)
    56	    for token in list(raw_argv):
    57	        text = str(token or "")
    58	        if text == "--use-vllm" or text.startswith("--use-vllm="):
    59	            raise SystemExit(
    60	                "--use-vllm has been removed; active RL always uses the colocated vLLM pure-pack route."
    61	            )
    62	        if text == "--vllm-mode" or text.startswith("--vllm-mode="):
    63	            raise SystemExit(
    64	                "--vllm-mode has been removed; active RL only supports the colocated pure-pack route."
    65	            )
    66	        if text in {"--vllm-server-host", "--vllm-server-port", "--vllm-server-timeout"} or any(
    67	            text.startswith(f"{flag}=") for flag in ("--vllm-server-host", "--vllm-server-port", "--vllm-server-timeout")
    68	        ):
    69	            raise SystemExit(
    70	                f"{text.split('=')[0]} has been removed; active RL no longer supports the server/client vLLM path."
    71	            )
    72	    vllm_parser = _build_vllm_parser()
    73	    vllm_args, remaining = vllm_parser.parse_known_args(raw_argv)
    74	    base_args = cli_shared.parse_active_rl_args(
    75	        remaining,
    76	        description="SAVER active RL entrypoint for the trajectory-level TRL + colocated-vLLM GRPO route.",
    77	    )
    78	    merged = argparse.Namespace(**vars(base_args))
    79	    for key, value in vars(vllm_args).items():
    80	        setattr(merged, key, value)
    81	    merged.use_vllm = True
    82	    merged.vllm_mode = "colocate"
    83	    return merged
    84	
    85	
    86	def run_trainer_trl_vllm(
    87	    *,
    88	    args: Any,
    89	    runtime: Any,
    90	    log_dir: str | Path = "",
    91	    config_builder: Any,
    92	    eval_config_builder: Any,
    93	    reference_model_resolver: Any,
    94	    select_iteration_indices_fn: Any,
    95	) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    96	    return run_trainer_vllm_grpo(
    97	        args=args,
    98	        runtime=runtime,
    99	        log_dir=str(log_dir) if log_dir else "",
   100	        config_builder=config_builder,
   101	        eval_config_builder=eval_config_builder,
   102	        reference_model_resolver=reference_model_resolver,
   103	        select_iteration_indices_fn=select_iteration_indices_fn,
   104	    )
   105	
   106	
   107	def _write_run_config(
   108	    *,
   109	    args: argparse.Namespace,
   110	    log_dir: Path,
   111	    rollout_eval_output_dir: str,
   112	) -> None:
   113	    write_json(
   114	        log_dir / "train_saver_rl_run_config.json",
   115	        {
   116	            "timestamp_utc": utc_timestamp(),
   117	            "script_entrypoint": "train_saver_rl_trl.py",
   118	            "data": args.data,
   119	            "data_root": args.data_root,
   120	            "materialized_train_items_path": str(getattr(args, "materialized_train_items_path", "") or ""),
   121	            "materialized_eval_items_path": str(getattr(args, "materialized_eval_items_path", "") or ""),
   122	            "require_materialized_runtime_cache": bool(getattr(args, "require_materialized_runtime_cache", False)),
   123	            "include_splits": cli_shared.parse_include_splits(args.include_splits) or [],
   124	            "output_dir": args.output_dir,
   125	            "log_dir": str(log_dir),
   126	            "rollout_eval_output_dir": rollout_eval_output_dir,
   127	            "resume_from_checkpoint": args.resume_from_checkpoint,
   128	            "resume_rollout_eval_only": bool(args.resume_rollout_eval_only),
   129	            "inline_rollout_eval": bool(args.inline_rollout_eval),
   130	            "model_path": args.model_path,
   131	            "reference_model_mode": "per_iteration_trainer_init",
   132	            "reference_model_source_path": args.model_path,
   133	            "num_iterations": int(args.num_iterations),
   134	            "rollout_count": int(args.rollout_count),
   135	            "num_generations": int(args.num_generations),
   136	            "rollout_max_turns": int(args.rollout_max_turns),
   137	            "rl_reward_version": str(args.rl_reward_version),
   138	            "kl_beta": float(args.kl_beta),
   139	            "use_vllm": True,
   140	            "vllm_mode": "colocate",
   141	            "vllm_tensor_parallel_size": int(args.vllm_tensor_parallel_size),
   142	            "vllm_gpu_memory_utilization": float(args.vllm_gpu_memory_utilization),
   143	            "vllm_guided_decoding_regex": str(args.vllm_guided_decoding_regex or ""),
   144	            "vllm_max_num_seqs": int(args.vllm_max_num_seqs),
   145	            "vllm_fallback_max_num_seqs": int(args.vllm_fallback_max_num_seqs),
   146	            "rl_rollout_use_cache": bool(args.rl_rollout_use_cache),
   147	            "rl_fecv_use_cache": bool(args.rl_fecv_use_cache),
   148	            "rl_compute_loss_microbatch_size": int(args.rl_compute_loss_microbatch_size),
   149	            "rl_steps_per_generation": int(args.rl_steps_per_generation),
   150	            "use_liger_loss_requested": bool(getattr(args, "use_liger_loss", False)),
   151	            "rollout_stage_batch_size": int(args.rollout_stage_batch_size),
   152	            "fecv_stage_batch_size": int(args.fecv_stage_batch_size),
   153	            "episode_grpo_trajectory_level": True,
   154	            "rl_replay_buffer_supported": False,
   155	            "rl_replay_buffer_mode": "disabled_episode_grpo",
   156	            "rl_fecv_failure_policy": str(args.rl_fecv_failure_policy),
   157	            "rl_log_empty_batch_rank_summary": bool(args.rl_log_empty_batch_rank_summary),
   158	            "rl_reward_config": dict(getattr(args, "rl_reward_config", {}) or {}),
   159	            "deepspeed": str(getattr(args, "deepspeed", "") or ""),
   160	            "proposal_model_path": str(args.proposal_model_path or ""),
   161	            "teacher_judge_model_path": str(args.teacher_judge_model_path or ""),
   162	            "teacher_judge_input_mode": str(args.teacher_judge_input_mode or ""),
   163	            "eval_data": str(args.eval_data or ""),
   164	        },
   165	    )
   166	
   167	
   168	def main(argv: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   169	    args = parse_args(argv)
   170	    if not args.resume_rollout_eval_only and not args.data:
   171	        raise ValueError("--data is required unless --resume-rollout-eval-only is used.")
   172	    if args.resume_rollout_eval_only and not args.resume_from_checkpoint:
   173	        raise ValueError("--resume-rollout-eval-only requires --resume-from-checkpoint.")
   174	
   175	    runtime = cli_shared.distributed_runtime_from_env()
   176	    cli_shared.init_torch_distributed(runtime)
   177	    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir)
   178	    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   179	    log_dir = resolve_experiment_log_dir(args.log_dir, output_dir=args.output_dir)
   180	    rollout_eval_output_dir = str(args.rollout_eval_output_dir or "").strip()
   181	
   182	    if runtime.is_main_process and log_dir is not None:
   183	        _write_run_config(
   184	            args=args,
   185	            log_dir=Path(log_dir),
   186	            rollout_eval_output_dir=rollout_eval_output_dir,
   187	        )
   188	
   189	    if args.resume_rollout_eval_only:
   190	        rollout_eval_config = cli_shared.build_rollout_eval_config(
   191	            args=args,
   192	            current_model_path=args.model_path,
   193	            reference_model_path=args.model_path,
   194	            config=cli_shared.build_saver_config(args),
   195	        )
   196	        if rollout_eval_config is None:
   197	            raise ValueError("--resume-rollout-eval-only requires --eval-data so the missing RL rollout eval can be replayed.")
   198	        checkpoint_path = Path(args.resume_from_checkpoint)
   199	        epoch_index = cli_shared.resolve_resume_epoch_index(checkpoint_path)
   200	        iteration_index = cli_shared.resolve_resume_iteration_index(checkpoint_path)
   201	        recovery_kwargs = dict(
   202	            checkpoint_path=checkpoint_path,
   203	            output_dir=cli_shared.resolve_resume_checkpoint_record_output_dir(
   204	                checkpoint_path,
   205	                fallback_output_dir=output_dir,
   206	            ),
   207	            rollout_eval_config=rollout_eval_config,
   208	            epoch_index=epoch_index,
   209	            model_path=args.model_path,
   210	            torch_dtype=args.torch_dtype,
   211	            attn_implementation=args.attn_implementation or None,
   212	            runtime=runtime,
   213	        )
   214	        if rollout_eval_output_dir:
   215	            recovery_kwargs["rollout_eval_output_dir"] = rollout_eval_output_dir
   216	        recovery_kwargs["policy_factory"] = build_recovery_vllm_policy_factory(args=args)
   217	        from saver_v3.sft.training import run_rollout_eval_from_checkpoint
   218	
   219	        result = run_rollout_eval_from_checkpoint(**recovery_kwargs)
   220	        final_summary = {
   221	            "resume_from_checkpoint": str(checkpoint_path),
   222	            "resume_rollout_eval_only": True,
   223	            "resume_iteration_index": int(iteration_index),
   224	            "resume_epoch_index": int(epoch_index),
   225	            "script_entrypoint": "train_saver_rl_trl.py",
   226	            **(result or {}),
   227	        }
   228	        if runtime.is_main_process and log_dir is not None:
   229	            write_json(Path(log_dir) / "train_saver_rl_summary.json", final_summary)
   230	        if runtime.is_main_process:
   231	            print(json.dumps(final_summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
   232	        return final_summary
   233	
   234	    result = run_trainer_trl_vllm(
   235	        args=args,
   236	        runtime=runtime,
   237	        log_dir=log_dir,
   238	        config_builder=cli_shared.build_saver_config,
   239	        eval_config_builder=cli_shared.build_rollout_eval_config,
   240	        reference_model_resolver=cli_shared.resolve_reference_model_path,
   241	        select_iteration_indices_fn=cli_shared.select_iteration_indices,
   242	    )
   243	    final_summary = {"latest_checkpoint": str(result.get("latest_checkpoint", args.model_path))}
   244	    if runtime.is_main_process:
   245	        print(json.dumps(final_summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
   246	    return final_summary
   247	
   248	
   249	if __name__ == "__main__":
   250	    main()

                                          VAU-R1: Advancing Video Anomaly Understanding
                                                  via Reinforcement Fine-Tuning


                                                                        Liyun Zhu1,2,∗ Qixiang Chen1 Xi Shen3 Xiaodong Cun2,†
                                                                    1
                                                                        Australian National University 2 GVC Lab, Great Bay University
                                                                                             3
                                                                                               Intellindust AI Lab
                                                                                   {liyun.zhu, u7227010}@anu.edu.au,




arXiv:2505.23504v1 [cs.CV] 29 May 2025
                                                                                  shenxiluc@gmail.com, cun@gbu.edu.cn


                                                                                                          Abstract
                                                          Video Anomaly Understanding (VAU) is essential for applications such as smart
                                                          cities, security surveillance, and disaster alert systems, yet remains challenging
                                                          due to its demand for fine-grained spatio-temporal perception and robust reasoning
                                                          under ambiguity. Despite advances in anomaly detection, existing methods often
                                                          lack interpretability and struggle to capture the causal and contextual aspects of
                                                          abnormal events. This limitation is further compounded by the absence of com-
                                                          prehensive benchmarks for evaluating reasoning ability in anomaly scenarios. To
                                                          address both challenges, we introduce VAU-R1, a data-efficient framework built
                                                          upon Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), which enhances anomaly
                                                          reasoning through Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT). Besides, we propose VAU-
                                                          Bench, the first Chain-of-Thought benchmark tailored for video anomaly reasoning,
                                                          featuring multiple-choice QA, detailed rationales, temporal annotations, and de-
                                                          scriptive captions. Empirical results show that VAU-R1 significantly improves
                                                          question answering accuracy, temporal grounding, and reasoning coherence across
                                                          diverse contexts. Together, our method and benchmark establish a strong founda-
                                                          tion for interpretable and reasoning-aware video anomaly understanding. Our code
                                                          is available at https://github.com/GVCLab/VAU-R1.
                                                                                              Qwen2.5-VL-7B                                                       Qwen2-VL-2B
                                                              100                             InternVL2.5-8B-MPO                  25                              Qwen2.5-VL-3B

                                                               94                             Qwen2.5-VL-3B+SFT                   20                              Qwen2.5-VL-3B+RFT

                                         Figure 1: Effectiveness of Reinforcement Fine-Tuning. We compare QA accuracy and temporal
                                         anomaly grounding performance across different models. VAU-R1, trained via Reinforcement
                                         Fine-Tuning (RFT), consistently outperforms its Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) counterpart. This
                                         demonstrates that RFT enhances both reasoning and temporal localization capabilities in VAU tasks.

                                         Anomalies are events or behaviors that deviate from regular patterns or expected activities in a
                                         given context. In surveillance settings, these may include incidents such as fighting, theft, or
